| | | | | | ** **_**[_WE 'RE ONLY ONE. SEAT. AWAY. Peter_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r) **_ _**[_BOLSTER OUR TRUMP ONE SEAT AWAY FUND_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)**_ ********************************************************************[_**ACT NOW >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)********************************************************************
Peter,

_Biden is leading our Nation towards the edge of DESTRUCTION - something HAS to change._
_Joe Biden and his radical Socialist friends in Washington have**defiled our country** and sparked **CRISIS AFTER CRISIS,** weakening our country every step of the way._
I just returned from __**Mar-A-Lago**__ and had a **critical Election Year Strategy meeting with President Donald J. Trump.** We both agreed we MUST restore the America FIRST Agenda, and the ONLY way to do that is TAKING the Senate BACK.
_**We are only one seat away**_ from saving America and restoring American greatness once more. The _**TRUMP One Seat Away Fund**_ will ensure our Party has the necessary resources to FIGHT the radical Left's overt lies and BRING BACK Trump's Majority.
_**TRUMP ONE SEAT AWAY FUND**_ _ _ ********************************************************************[_**FORTIFY NOW >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)********************************************************************
I truly believe the upcoming election this November WILL BE one of the most critical elections of our lifetime. We need every single Patriot to STEP UP and TAKE A STAND if we're going to RESCUE our country from the depths of socialist hell.
**[_Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT AWAY to bolster the Official Trump One Seat Away Fund and RESTORE our Republican Majority. >>_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)**
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)
Our country desperately needs American Patriots like YOU, Peter. If you don't step up, the Democrats will CONTINUE their destructive path towards communism.
_**The stakes are simply too high**_ for you to sit this one out. We need you to take action now before it's too late.
**[_Please contribute $35 or more AS SOON AS POSSIBLE toward our Official Trump One Seat Away Fund and help us WIN BACK our Majority._](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959145:6GpCbLoBN:m:1:3317145305:CE1FFCE000765EEE63919A506A75486F:r)**
Thank you,
Ted Cruz United States Senator from Texas

Team, By far the best part of this campaign has been getting to meet and speak with so many Marylanders all over the state. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43442583/337220057/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220327eoq3_am_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjA2Njk5My1lN2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrNquri02igaDrC10C5qusqf79BHn25CTBHYZtYQPsI=)

Not only have Wes and I been traveling to meet people where they’re at, but we’ve held multiple events with hundreds of people in attendance more regularly than any other campaign in this race.
The energy at our rallies is so electric, and it goes to show the momentum of this movement we’re building to lift up every Marylander.
**As you can imagine, these big events take a lot of resources to organize, and we’re going to have even more of them since the primary election date was pushed back to July.**
Wes and I are coming up on our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2022, and it’s crucial we reach our goal so we have the funds to keep up these events and bring people together.
**[With that in mind, will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford to help us reach our goal by Thursday’s deadline and keep up the momentum?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43442584/337220058/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220327eoq3_am_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjA2Njk5My1lN2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrNquri02igaDrC10C5qusqf79BHn25CTBHYZtYQPsI=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Joe Lombardo Research Team
subject: Take the Sisolak Approval Poll
body:
Governor Steve Sisolak has officially filed for re-election in the state of Nevada...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cPoPeeW7Wav0ZrOWQndB_i0QpFCNiw_DaOraek1bWO2ee-jKAX5wlt1O384dX4cwoBRrSMqKlorSRXZNSyfq_hJTmx-0P3OED1835jiCVfckuUnaKb8CraFaW49b1vEvxPmynwpyKhJLCxl40fwuI3bQdBgX7sENaZ2jGffiaFPp2CsO6Csc0v6hvAxx3sZRoEq0ptMgj_keVerNiIyxmg==&c=u92TnbCt3tVtUd9gXaH0R1oonHjVCI3o4Bgl7YQfmpMYsCoAv9CaAw==&ch=IX8Bfj25249hD5QcSZ7u6HVxbY4inxmbwgUVqWOSCMFPDFQPWxooEA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Governor Steve Sisolak has officially filed for re-election in the state of Nevada...
And with that news in mind, it's as good a time as any to reach out and see EXACTLY how Nevadans and Americans feel about this politician.
Your response helps our campaign gauge how folks are feeling on the ground! So if you have just two minutes, will you take our short Sisolak Approval Poll below and give us your direct feedback?
---
| | | [TAKE THE SISOLAK POLL HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cPoPeeW7Wav0ZrOWQndB_i0QpFCNiw_DaOraek1bWO2ee-jKAX5wlt1O384dX4cwoBRrSMqKlorSRXZNSyfq_hJTmx-0P3OED1835jiCVfckuUnaKb8CraFaW49b1vEvxPmynwpyKhJLCxl40fwuI3bQdBgX7sENaZ2jGffiaFPp2CsO6Csc0v6hvAxx3sZRoEq0ptMgj_keVerNiIyxmg==&c=u92TnbCt3tVtUd9gXaH0R1oonHjVCI3o4Bgl7YQfmpMYsCoAv9CaAw==&ch=IX8Bfj25249hD5QcSZ7u6HVxbY4inxmbwgUVqWOSCMFPDFQPWxooEA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cPoPeeW7Wav0ZrOWQndB_i0QpFCNiw_DaOraek1bWO2ee-jKAX5wlt1O384dX4cwoBRrSMqKlorSRXZNSyfq_hJTmx-0P3OED1835jiCVfckuUnaKb8CraFaW49b1vEvxPmynwpyKhJLCxl40fwuI3bQdBgX7sENaZ2jGffiaFPp2CsO6Csc0v6hvAxx3sZRoEq0ptMgj_keVerNiIyxmg==&c=u92TnbCt3tVtUd9gXaH0R1oonHjVCI3o4Bgl7YQfmpMYsCoAv9CaAw==&ch=IX8Bfj25249hD5QcSZ7u6HVxbY4inxmbwgUVqWOSCMFPDFQPWxooEA==)
---
| We don't want to have to rely on outside polls for a topic as important as the future of Nevada \- so instead, we're reaching out directly ourselves.
Sisolak has put forward sweeping changes to our state and followed the direction of Gavin Newsom, [and we want to see how YOU feel about this.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cPoPeeW7Wav0ZrOWQndB_i0QpFCNiw_DaOraek1bWO2ee-jKAX5wlt1O384dX4cwoBRrSMqKlorSRXZNSyfq_hJTmx-0P3OED1835jiCVfckuUnaKb8CraFaW49b1vEvxPmynwpyKhJLCxl40fwuI3bQdBgX7sENaZ2jGffiaFPp2CsO6Csc0v6hvAxx3sZRoEq0ptMgj_keVerNiIyxmg==&c=u92TnbCt3tVtUd9gXaH0R1oonHjVCI3o4Bgl7YQfmpMYsCoAv9CaAw==&ch=IX8Bfj25249hD5QcSZ7u6HVxbY4inxmbwgUVqWOSCMFPDFQPWxooEA==)
Once Sheriff Joe is elected, he won't wait for the Governor of California to tell him what to do...

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Investments in our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I know you're out enjoying your Sunday afternoon - so I'll make this quick - **but I 've had a wonderful week celebrating the federal investments we are bringing home to our counties here in Virginia.**
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
---
I am proud of my work to support local community needs and investments, and I'm excited to share some highlights.
* $1 million to fund addiction support and treatment services in the greater Richmond area
* $1.8 million to expand a Spotsylvania water treatment plant - because access to clean water is essential to public health
* $900 thousand for the Blackstone Volunteer Fire Department to invest in a new truck to speed up response time
* $200 thousand to replace the roof at The Carver Center in Culpeper County
* $120 thousand to improve fields and facilities in Orange County - an important investment in community sports and recreation

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
_Celebrating Blackstone Volunteer Fire Department 's new truck!_ These are the kind of tangible impacts I'm so proud to be delivering for our district - **and I can 't wait to see what more is in store for Virginia when we win re-election this fall.**

[_**With that in mind, will you consider a contribution to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)
---
With gratitude,
Abigail

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wqm2kwq-o0nRGWPxJ05_t16W4jPyh6fKQgks4DTTuS4=/4OthtQNnPd3a45ko8zE586iHtJcSiljNnxN1756RxTQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220327-1-EM&amount=25)

Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: NC-Sen couldn’t be closer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I’m reaching out personally to ask for your support
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7756?t=6&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo) Our race for North Carolina’s open Senate seat could hardly be any closer. The latest polling shows me in a statistical tie with my Republican opponents. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7756?t=7&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo) Look, this is going to be so, so close, and it is so important that we do all we can to win. Flipping North Carolina’s Senate seat would be transformative.

[**_If you can, please split a $5 donation between our campaign and Voter Protection Project today so we can reach more voters and win. We can change what is possible in the U.S. Senate by flipping this seat and expanding our majority._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7756?t=8&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7757?t=9&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7758?t=10&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7759?t=11&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7760?t=12&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7756?t=13&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
North Carolina is a purple state, and we know that our elections are usually very close. And when I say this race could come down to a handful of votes, it’s because I’ve seen it happen.

It happened to me, in fact. My race for Chief Justice was decided by just 401 votes. Out of 5,391,501 votes. In a race where I earned more votes than almost every Democrat on the ticket — including President Biden.

The latest polling is showing we could be in for just as close of a race, so we cannot afford to take anything for granted here. That’s why I’m asking:

[**_Will you split a $5 donation between our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat and Voter Protection Project today? There’s no doubt in my mind that every dollar will make a difference when the votes are counted._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7761?t=14&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7757?t=15&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7758?t=16&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7759?t=17&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7760?t=18&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7756?t=19&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
In a race that could come down to such a narrow margin, this is why we have to work even harder. What we each do can truly make a difference.

Cheri Beasley
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1631%2E878179%2E9am3Yo)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:

With a 50-50 split in the Senate right now, defending our Democratic majority this year is going to be an uphill battle. But the best defense is a good offense, which is why I've endorsed Mandela Barnes to defeat Ron Johnson and win back Wisconsin's U.S. Senate seat for Democrats. Look, Wisconsin is a golden opportunity for us to flip a Republican-held seat. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the state in 2020. And Ron Johnson has been named the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election this year. Mandela's race gives us the chance to not only keep our Senate majority, but to expand it even further. This race is as important as they come. So with Mandela facing an important FEC fundraising deadline in just a few days, I am asking you: [**Can you split a $3 contribution between Mandela Barnes' campaign for U.S. Senate and Warren Democrats? >
Earlier this year, Ron Johnson announced that he’s running for re-election, going back on his word that he wouldn’t be seeking another term in office.
Now, I’m not all that surprised by Ron Johnson’s dishonesty — he’s proven to be one of the leading spreaders of misinformation in the Trump era, on everything from election integrity to climate change to COVID-19.
I could go on and on and on and on about Ron Johnson’s history of falsehoods and lies. His brand of politics continues to threaten the very fabric of our democracy. Who knows how much more damage he can cause given another six years?
Mandela Barnes is exactly the candidate we can count on to defeat him, and Mandela will also make us proud in the Senate.
He’ll fight to create opportunities for hardworking families like the one he grew up in. His mom was a Milwaukee school teacher, and his dad worked the third shift at the General Motors plant. Those were solid, middle-class union jobs — the kind of jobs that could support a family. The kind of jobs that have slipped away as giant corporations have tilted the playing field in their favor.
I know right down to my bones that Mandela is our best chance to win back Wisconsin's Senate seat — as long as we all get in the fight.
Since his race is currently rated as a toss-up, we can’t wait a moment longer to build the momentum we’re going to need to win this thing and send Ron Johnson packing.
[**Please split a $3 contribution before this important FEC deadline if you can to help send Mandela Barnes to the U.S. Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43443529/337224835/2011303260?contactdata=KxLcOcWTRqZYFqyc3Nlv6JnxKDhicKkprofZOgOWa99GrC5jOxZpQdB7NUz4nb8yM6mZ%2Bp7gm7def34QVVOj1hjec9HS%2F9wUOMhjCdSSvQPhuWPEs%2FGhOgj%2FaxrEB9et&refcode=EMZ3Y_TAN_E_20220327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGIyZTZhMy1lY2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JZkG3i6zjRy4tLeKDfDlcx2vjt8tfhKHQ-8PdJxO9w=&emci=b2b2e6a3-ecad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=bdb2e6a3-ecad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)

name: SCOTUS Update via DASS
subject: We warned you about the GOP’s newest voter suppression scheme.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team, we warned you about the GOP’s plan to kill voting rights through the Supreme Court.
Now, we’re seeing it in action: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D]
FIRST: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D] We warned you that Trump and Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court was working overtime to gut the Voting Rights Act.
THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D] The Court let Alabama keep its “egregious” gerrymander that vastly cut the voting power of Black voters.
AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B2_AC_30D] Our worst fears have come true – the court is bending “any rules necessary to ensure a Republican victory”. name: Donald Trump
subject: I hate to say it, but I was right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | Peter,

I've got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: Do you MISS ME YET?

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. Guess what? I was right! I hate to say it, but I was right.
It's painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that's what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.
Take a moment to let me know if you miss me and the AMERICA FIRST policies my team and I put into place during our FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.
****[MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959205:JZGdlLoNB:m:1:3317145305:83ED3A59E0CE1072A8F019ED63A1E50E:r)** **
I'd like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. tonight so don't wait - let us know if you want us back in office.
I'd ask my supporters the same question I'm asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn't like what I had to say! Wonder why he hasn't banned Putin yet...
Thanks for your support, Donald Trump
---

Friend, the Republican Party has hit a new low. Just look at this headline:

**The Washington Post:_"_ Arizona lawmaker speaks to white nationalists, calls for violence – and sets fundraising records"**
That's right: Arizona lawmaker Wendy Rogers called for people she perceived as her political enemies to be hanged from gallows, posted a series of racist and anti-Semitic tweets and has well-publicized ties to white nationalists.

_**And yet instead of becoming a total pariah as a result of her extremism, Rogers has actually become a FAVORITE politician for Trump supporters across the country. **_

Marco Lopez (D) was the first gubernatorial candidate in this state to call for consequences and official censure for Rogers' outrageous behavior. **But we need a groundswell of Democrats to speak out against Rogers' NOW to prove there are more of us than there are of the Trump supporters standing behind her. **
**Please, if you oppose racist politicians and GOP extremism, speak out immediately:**
| | **Friend, you've been personally selected to respond to our LIVE poll:**
---
**WILL YOU CONDEMN GOP EXTREMISTS LIKE WENDY ROGERS?**

name: Conor Lamb
subject: quick note from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43444791/337230822/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg5MjZiYi1mMGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8iDrDQOgkKbfiglE91ELyPMH7WB8Xn8ukhBK5Ltwu4=)

Hey,

I'm in the car right now, and my team just asked me to write you a quick note.

First, thank you for following along and keeping up with our campaign. If you're reading this, you probably follow politics pretty closely, and you know that the PA senate race is the most important election in the country.

You also may know that this month, four years ago, I won a huge special election in a district that Trump won by almost 20 points. I decided to run for Senate because I know what it takes to win tough races, I know how to beat the Trump machine, and I know how to get things done. I can win this race, help break the gridlock in the senate, vote to abolish the filibuster, and deliver real results for the American people.

If you're getting this email, our team has you listed in our records as someone who hasn't contributed to our campaign yet in 2022. I'm reaching out because March is the last public fundraising deadline of this campaign. This is the most closely watched race in America, and the whole country is paying attention to how many grassroots small-dollar donors pitch in to help power our campaign.

I know that money is tight these days, and you might not be able to make a big contribution. That's why today, **I’m asking for just $4.**

The leading Republicans in this race are a hedge fund manager and a reality TV star. They rely on big donations from corporate PACs and their billionaire friends.

That's not how I'm running my campaign. I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs. I rely on supporters like you – and I know that together we can beat their big money, just like we did four years ago.

**[Can you become a 2022 donor, and pitch in $4 ahead of the final quarterly FEC fundraising deadline in this primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43444792/337230823/-993140480?refcode=em22_220327_eoq3nd&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg5MjZiYi1mMGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8iDrDQOgkKbfiglE91ELyPMH7WB8Xn8ukhBK5Ltwu4=)**

Thank you for supporting our campaign. Let’s win this together.

– Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43444793/337230824/-993140480?refcode=em22_220327_eoq3nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg5MjZiYi1mMGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8iDrDQOgkKbfiglE91ELyPMH7WB8Xn8ukhBK5Ltwu4=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43444794/337230825/-993140480?refcode=em22_220327_eoq3nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg5MjZiYi1mMGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8iDrDQOgkKbfiglE91ELyPMH7WB8Xn8ukhBK5Ltwu4=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c5596fe5-72ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/3a8926bb-f0ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg5MjZiYi1mMGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8iDrDQOgkKbfiglE91ELyPMH7WB8Xn8ukhBK5Ltwu4=&id=122167450).

name: Sarah
subject: hey there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there!
This is Sarah at Republican HQ. I just combed through the responses on our Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey for our top supporters only... and I didn't see your name. [**Do you have a quick minute to fill it out before I send the results over to House leadership?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
I know you're busy so I can promise you it will only take one or two minutes to fill out.
_Here are a handful of questions you can expect:_
**Official 2022 Government Satisfaction Survey**
1. [**Do you think the country is headed in the right direction or on the wrong track?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
2. [**Do you approve of Joe Biden's time in office so far?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
3. [**How would you rate the federal government's performance?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
4. [**How important is it for Republicans to take back the House?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
5. [**What should the GOP prioritize for the rest of the year?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
6. [**Do you have anything else to share with leaders in the Republican Party?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)

****[ADD YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956271:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)****
---
This is your chance to be open and honest with House Republican leadership.
I'm not reaching out to everyone -- just a handful of our top supporters.**So can I look for your response in the next few minutes?**
Thank you!
\-- Sarah
_(From Republican HQ -- Team Scalise)_
* * *
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956272:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
Congratulations!
Because of your proud support of President Trump and our America first movement, you have qualified for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
As a small token of our appreciation, we're giving you the chance to have a face-to-face dinner with President Donald J. Trump.
Oh, and did we mention we'll pay for the dinner + the flight + the hotel?
You have 90 minutes from the time you opened this email to enter.
**[ENTER TO WIN HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956272:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956273:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)
We asked nicely, now we're BEGGING! Republicans need 42 Patriots to give $35 -- if not, we'll MISS tonight's goal! PLEASE do your part!
**[CHIP IN $35 NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956273:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)**
How important is it to you that Republicans flip the House? Republicans only need *five* seats to WIN the House. Will you do your part? [**Chip in $35 as soon as you can.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59956273:6GQE2LoMN:m:1:3253819041:72DBBD2F6F4EF150C6693DF03F264286:r)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Elissa’s opponent named a ‘young gun’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28]
Team,
Recently we told you that Elissa’s opponent was on the National Republican Congressional Committee’s (NRCC) radar for their “Young Guns” program.
Well, it’s official: Elissa’s opponent is a member of the “Young Guns.”
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28]
This means the NRCC considers him to be a promising new recruits as they look to flip the House this year – AND that he’s about to get a huge influx of cash from groups around the country looking to do the same.
This was already going to be one of the most competitive House races in the country, and now national Republicans have made it clear that flipping Elissa’s seat is one of their top priorities. Will you chip in today to help ensure Elissa’s district (and the House of Representatives) stay blue in November? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28]
Team Slotkin
Team,
Some major news: our opponent has gained the attention of the National Republican Campaign Committee (NRCC).
The NRCC recently released a list of candidates who they have "On the Radar" as potential members of their 2022 “Young Guns” program. The “Young Guns” program supports candidates who the NRCC considers to be their most promising new recruits that are running in districts they plan to heavily invest in. This list also serves as a signal to groups across the country on what races to put their money in. And you guessed it, Elissa’s opponent is on this list.
This just confirms what we already know: the race for the new MI-07 is being closely watched nationwide. In fact, only *one* other Michigan candidate made it on the NRCC’s list.
We’ve got a tough fight ahead in the most competitive House race in Michigan (not to mention one of the most competitive in the entire country), and Elissa is going to need the resources to compete with the money the other side is already spending AND the influx of cash likely to flow in from this announcement.
We need to combat the money resulting from this announcement with our grassroots supporters – will you chip in today?
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220327&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Letitia
subject: Together, we can get through this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43431170/337180902/265476937?code=jtk413-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjRmMTNiNS1kMmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDl2o5Wldl5IrBsqvEREGFLgRDzNj-NHG2KsFOt3_1M=)
---
Peter, two years ago, the earth seemed to shift beneath our feet.

Suddenly, entire families found themselves stuck at home, having to navigate a full house at all hours of the day. Those lucky enough to have jobs that could be done remotely turned their living rooms and kitchens into makeshift offices. And many who could not work remotely watched their paychecks come to a terrifying halt.

**It almost seems impossible that, two years later, we are still fighting the disastrous impacts of COVID-19. But know this: New York WILL get through this trying time.

Peter, the last two years have been long and exhausting for us all, but as we work to rebuild, I need to know how the pandemic has impacted your life and shifted your priorities. [My team set a goal to collect 5,000 responses before midnight tomorrow, so please take 60 seconds now to take my survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43431171/337180903/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk413-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjRmMTNiNS1kMmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDl2o5Wldl5IrBsqvEREGFLgRDzNj-NHG2KsFOt3_1M=&emci=7b10e8a9-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b4f13b5-d2ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43431172/337180904/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk413-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjRmMTNiNS1kMmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDl2o5Wldl5IrBsqvEREGFLgRDzNj-NHG2KsFOt3_1M=&emci=7b10e8a9-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b4f13b5-d2ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
---
COVID-19 has devastated far too many. Nearly _**600,000 New York househol**_ _**ds**_ are still behind on rent. **_T_**** _ens of thousands _****_of New Yorke_** _**rs **_have lost their lives, including too many of our most vulnerable nursing home residents. And communities of color, who have long suffered under an unequal system, have been hit the **_hardest_**.

**I have spent every moment of the last two years fighting to defend New Yorkers from the worst impacts of COVID-19, but this pandemic continues to change every day. And while we may _finally_ ****be approaching the end of the disease, the consequences continue to devastate. That’s why my team set a goal to hear from 5,000 fearless fighters, but I’m still missing your voice. **

**[Peter, I urgently need to hear your story. Will you take one moment to share your thoughts, concerns, and priorities with me in this quick survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43431173/337180905/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk413-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjRmMTNiNS1kMmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDl2o5Wldl5IrBsqvEREGFLgRDzNj-NHG2KsFOt3_1M=&emci=7b10e8a9-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6b4f13b5-d2ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, two years ago, the earth seemed to shift beneath our feet. Suddenly, entire families found themselves stuck at home, having to navigate a full house at all hours of the day. Those lucky enough to have jobs that could be done remotely turned their living rooms and kitchens into makeshift offices. And many who could not work remotely watched their paychecks come to a terrifying halt. It almost seems impossible that, two years later, we are still fighting the disastrous impacts of COVID-19. But know this: New York WILL get through this trying time. Peter, the last two years have been long and exhausting for us all, but as we work to rebuild, I need to know how the pandemic has impacted your life and shifted your priorities. | | COVID-19 has devastated far too many. Nearly 600,000 New York househol ds are still behind on rent. T ens of thousands of New Yorke rs have lost their lives, including too many of our most vulnerable nursing home residents. And communities of color, who have long suffered under an unequal system, have been hit the hardest. I have spent every moment of the last two years fighting to defend New Yorkers from the worst impacts of COVID-19, but this pandemic continues to change every day. And while we may finally be approaching the end of the disease, the consequences continue to devastate. That’s why my team set a goal to hear from 5,000 fearless fighters, but I’m still missing your voice. | | Thank you for joining this fight. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

body:

Dear Fellow Conservative, Once you accept your Heritage membership invitation, your official membership card will be on its way!

I hope will you carry your card with pride—knowing that you are a part of an elite group of half a million Heritage Foundation members who believe in and fight to defend the Constitution and America's founding principles.

Alexander Hyatt

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Trump just came to Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in now.
| | |
---
Team, I’m running for reelection to keep Georgia blue and deliver meaningful progress for our country – but Donald Trump just came to Georgia for the second time in six months to rally his MAGA base and boost my potential GOP opponent, and I need your help to fight back.
National Republicans have already spent millions smearing me with attack ads to flip this seat and take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. And with experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _POLITICO_ saying that Democrats' chances of defending our majority hinge on winning this race, there's too much at stake to lose here.
**But I'll be honest: Trump's visit and the GOP's huge spending spree could put my seat – and our entire Senate majority – at risk unless we fight back immediately. That's why I've set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in now:**
**[_So I am asking – will you rush $5 or more ASAP, split between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s reelection campaign, to fight back against GOP attacks, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43446350/337237682/-323915468?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk794-bu-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY0NTI2Yi1mOGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kE9vTiIKWv2ZocGVnr8yoAteKFGZiLiU-xy2tgQK7jw=)**

body:

clean_body: | | | | This was so important that I had to reach out personally. | Peter Willis, Before our first quarterly deadline of the election year tonight, I wanted to make sure I reached out to you personally. To put it simply, we CANNOT come up short of our goal just ONE DAY away. Coming up short means 4 more years of a Democrat destroying the once great state of Pennsylvania. Since I was born and raised here, I simply can’t let that happen. But right now, we are still $1,975 short of our goal. That’s why I’ve authorized an EXTENDED 200% IMPACT on ALL donations. Thank you, | | Lou Barletta Conservative for Pennsylvania Governor | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

$15,000, Peter. That's how much we need to raise by midnight on March 31st. In a moment, we'll explain why — **[but before we do, can we count on you to chip in $10? We have FOUR days to reach our goal, and we need all the support we can get:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSCW208u7pxssAR80x9n4uuwUfDcPfKvj_-nPr-cytIQE5IZIWJ-4FC33IeSYZENQBC01LdTOoMqeBThWa3ctH5hLxSaqZ7Oa1d8gPZfTz9U-m2fOAm9Aj_UCNB61TdMxRYxq81U8sdxvwAPO02OIyu_gdhJPVpl3-efFUSrfKUqoSeQxiZPvKWj3ab81CfSmccJFqm7IxpbtQBoRsX0a8107yWKidrZo8WOLl_PmPN0lqqs3_IiLBOjs9cgQbkxMaV_zbM21U_1ieezSCpb1MgRLHwYDcPiSrQaiyIx7kznJrJAUXprPi8natWglOrug_/3kp/H48lEZ4MSRKBUaLx2oSVEw/h1/Isu3H3DRUfAnigUr6XVXC1TyIOFKTw9JTy8A4E-1JRM)** **[Contribute $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSCW208u7pxssAR80x9n4uuwUfDcPfKvj_-nPr-cytIQGQ_yV24WdO0heNJ4oCLWl-bCU9lWEmEnsbQJke0fgIFSUWDEvK8zT-6voBSvTEzUtEyypyq6akGvIrJNtW09W5wu_4QgjJr7PqxzF6Y7m9xwa4ue9O8IsNRhL5uBY4uWbqoQAZNRS-aRQCmis5wIe3nowl9vmKmLpejeCD4f7GktGzwIciEtjZYGbaVNU8ULjo4rUZbjAbkQQ2PA_fMCoPTT_cxmR1l7ypbJh2327UAwXWGdzLUTaPVARbOkzI7-DE-qElHi5EzLGlDgCREPGX/3kp/H48lEZ4MSRKBUaLx2oSVEw/h2/jQc83lzvOMMzLXa8nFpx4JxZD1t3NmifcTF1QwYhO3k)** Here's the deal. March 31st is a Federal Elections Commission (FEC) deadline for candidates and committees to report their fundraising numbers to the public. This deadline doesn't apply to us — **but it DOES apply to Kyrsten Sinema.** And it means she's going to raise a bunch of last-minute money from her Big Oil and Big Pharma Donors to strengthen her FEC report. If we don't keep pace with Sinema's end-of-quarter fundraising spree, we risk falling behind — and eventually mounting an under-resourced primary challenge that can't compete with her massive TV, radio, digital, and field budgets. **[We've done the math, and we need to reach $15,000 in digital donations by March 31st to ensure our grassroots movement stays strong enough to take on Sinema. This is ground we can't afford to lose. Please, Peter, can you pitch in $10 or as much as you can today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSCW208u7pxssAR80x9n4uuwUfDcPfKvj_-nPr-cytIQFL-GAyhnR84O2XgkVw20Brad9TQBnGcOxTVZ4b40PnN95emAO_zlxvyNGZAKaRGOUoeH9G1cTfWHImncMEMclgo2RUk6rk17lIckVNAgSXrKDy_B_ZKc4cLlnezctF0gxVgKcbIdIBTokaMV-0dlp-y3YR8ZFUFe3dn5yVnga5Lr-66CHkBrq1UpV_i6t6_IL3cAoqS6_IKSpH-4ngW1RTEnjpkwMgT__nU8p7Luh0HMbj7PHX5uPybx9GQs-KMcJ74p37_byWp-H_wgWbNjke/3kp/H48lEZ4MSRKBUaLx2oSVEw/h3/rCpDl1eVDYIAuz769a8FpTc4nNpN8qQBawz2O8-ccoo)** Reaching our $15,000 goal this month means we can move resources and funding to on-the-ground groups in Arizona who are organizing around the clock to reach Arizona voters and oust Sinema from the Senate, once and for all. It means that we'll be able to keep holding Sinema accountable — and expand our broader work to maintain a Democratic Senate majority this election year — without compromise. It means critical early investments in voter outreach, volunteer recruitment, and grassroots infrastructure that will return major dividends by Election Day. And yes, Peter, $15,000 may be the amount on a single check Kyrsten Sinema gets from one of her wealthy GOP donors. But unlike Sinema, we have a powerful team of grassroots donors we can count on. So we have to ask once more: **[Please make your best donation before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on March 31. subject: They tried to silence me
body:
If you’ve seen me on conservative news shows, or are familiar with my work at TownHall or PJ Media, you know I don’t apologi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm8t0j688bo0e4uql706pdbf8lcsq8g2viaeras8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onle2p6dcdkm1qe1pr6csp35d9nm6rrap5imqrj6dhjc3hreolkeerj3cll64o6eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb76kp6fdj5cor61cr3cuobapbi4no)
If you’ve seen me on conservative news shows, or are familiar with my work at TownHall or PJ Media, you know I don’t apologize for my conservative values, and I’ll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt. I’m proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!** **And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren’t ashamed of America or our values either.** **But there are millions of young people who aren’t provided with the truth about your conservative ideas... ** [**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zueji47lpf46k96vdl2gqas04pd0qrbhf001hgq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh2bs) It’s easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination. They’re high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom. Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas. I should know—just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona. **It didn’t take me long to realize that my teachers didn’t just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me...****_they hated them._** My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the “gold standard” when it came to presenting the “truth” in their classes. But I had no idea they’d try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America’s Foundation (YAF).** With YAF’s support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus. He had just written a book about “how radical professors at America’s top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. “ And I was just about to discover just how right he was. Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz’s lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for “security” because administrators had deemed the lecture “controversial.” Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn’t know about it. Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up. Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.** University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom. **And I learned a valuable lesson: ** **The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.** Oh, you won’t hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media. But I've witnessed it firsthand. [**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**** **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3dig9v0ujqsiaoa4f2o7tioq77rl387h0k6n8k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh238h5e8he48ejm79r1cbhe1r75pt7kjq36ct2ekpn6st66urq8d1hc4qj4pb6chieacph6thm9pv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9l69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mpiasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64oj0cph6epui24bhfl6k2cbtd42gapjt4l8jav8585d72u850kp5e5qrfkbm6njhf42ga9iq4o32c9g6coj7c8iv0) **You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I’m one of their speakers.** And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted – such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values. For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as “controversial” and imposed a “security fee” on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was “controversial,” and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed “security fee” in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I’m not the only YAF speaker who’s had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.** **Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.** The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints. **_But the Left is terrified of your ideas._** That’s why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us. I’ve heard many good people say it’s too late...there’s nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism. **_But it’s simply not true – YAF is living proof we CAN stop them. _** Time and time again, **_YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON_** – ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas. **Let’s face it – with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won’t hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them** And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students. **[If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America’s Foundation today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8lmf3hahjfde8coc6os0bphfcnenbmcnc8bosfo_rp2ash2s8gt7cejm2on2s3mebjqf97k6cpq4t9jedpqcdtnkgq32o9l69imcp34skpj2dr3cjjuasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jacin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h60pj2ctjt448n2vad84onqq850lj7q9ah6lugagaqe5sga19iasblmv8ncdf72u850kj5k9g64oj0cph6eoh1k8gn48n24hhm2o71c1im1oj3c8iv0)** Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country. In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF... _Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._ **This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.** We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia. The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice. Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission. Gratefully, **K atie Pavlich ** _Fox News Contributor_ _New York Times Bestselling Author_ _Editor, Townhall.com_ _Young __America's Foundation Speaker_ [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5d3s2na1eitq9ohdjos5aii2im0888768vbree8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh238h5e8he48ejm79r1cbhe1r75pt7kjq36ct2ekpn6st66urq8d1hc4qj4pb6chieacph6thm9pv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9l69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mpiasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64oj0cph6epui24bhfl6k2cbtd42gapjt4l8jav8585d72u850kp5e5qrfkbm6njhf42ga9iq4o32c9g6coj7c8iv0) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zta5ivd91h4ei0hjvqifn5dj9aon746sps3v5u0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh238h5e8he48ejm79r1cbhe1r75pt7kjq36ct2ekpn6st66urq8d1hc4qj4pb6chieacph6thm9pv5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls88he5d2ak9l69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mpiasblmvb38ddgegqbectls9g64oj0cph6epui24bhfl6k2cbtd42gapjt4l8jav8585d72u850kp5e5qrfkbm6njhf42ga9iq4o32c9g6coj7c8iv0) | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3o7e0m5h061gnob7vqi2avkt7p736lsnofoj02g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zril5fthl2vn3r0qftr9jcoucc8qktjt4m2bknto_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcdlgibmct0fho4p73tlsskvsip6mlsm1i4ntbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5g6ao72cdh2bs)

body:

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43446981/337240425/-1739877693?refcode=20220327_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDYzNjIyNy1mZWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKEyMbn_m422ZwiB9W4YdZ9WRFfLf_VCha9DMjrRZeE=) Friend, We all know about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s dangerous rhetoric and vile beliefs. **But did you know that she didn’t even have a Democratic opponent in 2020? The Democratic nominee dropped out months before the election.** **That all changes this year, because I’m a Democrat who’s running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.** I’ve served this country on multiple continents, and I’m sick of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene fight to undermine our democracy and alienate us from the rest of the world. I’ll be honest: this isn’t going to be an easy mission. But my time in the service taught me that by working together and not giving up -- anything is possible. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been incredibly lucky to receive support from so many Conservative patriots since launching my campaign. And boy do I need it.

I am in the fight of my life to be Connecticut’s next _Republican_ Senator and to oust a career politician _with a massive (and growing) bank account._ It’s no easy feat, but I’m up for the challenge, because I know it will be worth it when a **red wave** sweeps through the nation this November.

**Which leads me to why I’m emailing you today:** [**I’m reaching out to each and every conservative warrior who is tired of politicians putting America last – and asking that they personally endorse my campaign for election immediately.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a3ebdad2d80a4669a10c636e55be9988&_e=R14KM6Nsf54Re3YmiQl-P479hLwQ8BoGHfXSdJw6_33KnjtNckHMYZEnTgyaHS3iTwX8lo_JFBEtya2iD7zaXHtS-qf4C44bS8YQH0-iIJkGFKAh5GH8mDGrs1XZSljMU-6CWwrdSxk9x0BCtq4nLHEUE-_K9imzLtjCkABplQibjscNXrgXbxdihCNHsA6rkPn47_vKETU5R6sbKyO6jSea69HwKezLZD9OYFYF5UknNnBhn0AkRUO_8vP-z32ZmXiP34FByzdI00OYJhe08vbQfPic_8ysscTuqCkCOfUYuTupEAKdxNlYbGY2Ca7TD63nBuwr5LHxgUNXhEshy7OZb7FbFKb7XrCXQ48Mumu8JZXK3SCazhJNc2PEUprhvD91lCGv2IrpX2hIhWL4X1PrGl6MMPimllXihO1PYftKBjXzr5QH2Gsd8X3trG9vYgaK6Bj2usGoeqtd2WnGywxZd6JkgqT0Ba6biouycQOZnyaWPflkKSBizrf9F0zVPD3K1PthE6D-XU8WWPh8meot3vdjJ71kFim8dv_Qv2pSlDZWQj-rrKO9A7z8KJPb)

[
](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a3ebdad2d80a4669a10c636e55be9988&_e=R14KM6Nsf54Re3YmiQl-P479hLwQ8BoGHfXSdJw6_33KnjtNckHMYZEnTgyaHS3iTwX8lo_JFBEtya2iD7zaXHtS-qf4C44bS8YQH0-iIJkGFKAh5GH8mDGrs1XZSljMU-6CWwrdSxk9x0BCtq4nLHEUE-_K9imzLtjCkABplQibjscNXrgXbxdihCNHsA6rkPn47_vKETU5R6sbKyO6jSea69HwKezLZD9OYFYF5UknNnBhn0AkRUO_8vP-z32ZmXiP34FByzdI00OYJhe08vbQfPic_8ysscTuqCkCOfUYuTupEAKdxNlYbGY2Ca7TD63nBuwr5LHxgUNXhEshy7OZb7FbFKb7XrCXQ48MumubZKVGHuaKk5CvpDGdeAh60idbaDrygj2hVWfpkqULlHvGLgsbh1Svq8ily01F4pt5PrvVog1acJoasLbKXSD1WqLBvK_FIItJD8MpkiZtEvq5zwwt403-Pt38_osiE-USoRTw6p59TFZOtZi92pS0Z_vCleyqKl9173AuUYyyuVVCQv_avI0NDdJl_Z--odspFUqpo-j_74eNxQtcbRix)
You already know that I would do anything to protect prosperity and defend freedom here in America – _otherwise I wouldn’t be running for a seat in the Senate._

As an immigrant from communist Cuba, a proud mother, wife, and a businesswoman, it breaks my heart to see what President Biden and his enablers (like my opponent) have done to this country. Father. Husband. Marine.

| **_Tyler Kistner_**
* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: The timing is not great
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Multiple dark money groups, a Mitch McConnell-connected group, and a $10 million super PAC all started spending money to defeat us.
#

[**We are writing with an URGENT request: Can you PLEASE make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before one of our FINAL FEC deadlines of the campaign comes to a close this week?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2457_6688874_wWdaj6&akid=2457%2E6688874%2EwWdaj6)
What a campaign...
**FIRST:**
Multiple dark money groups, a Mitch McConnell-connected group, and a $10 million super PAC all started spending money to defeat us.
**THEN:**
Donald Trump came to town talking about how the most important thing his supporters can do to take back America is to defeat Mark Kelly in this re-election campaign.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2457_6688874_wWdaj6&akid=2457%2E6688874%2EwWdaj6)
**NOW:**
We missed our fundraising goals for the month of February and are behind on our March progress. The timing is not great at all and we really need to reach our goals before it’s too late.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2457_6688874_wWdaj6&akid=2457%2E6688874%2EwWdaj6)
**PLEASE:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before one of our final FEC fundraising deadlines of the campaign comes to a close in just a few days?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-7&t=4&refcode2=2457_6688874_wWdaj6&akid=2457%2E6688874%2EwWdaj6)
Thank you in advance for chipping in here. This is so important.
— Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2457%2E6688874%2EwWdaj6).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Maura Curtin via AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Hi Friends, it’s Maura, Alessandra’s Campaign Treasurer.
I’m reaching out to ask if you can make a donation of $5, or any amount you can afford, to help us hit our $7,349 End-of-Quarter goal on 3/31. We’re currently $5,450 short.
[**If you’re able to make that donation, you can click here to do that,**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220327-1-60&refcode2=634_59515_IaJ46G&akid=634%2E59515%2EIaJ46G) but if you need to hear a bit more about where your money is going, read on. **
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220327-1-60&refcode2=634_59515_IaJ46G&akid=634%2E59515%2EIaJ46G)**
You’re likely aware that we have just 90 days to go until Alessandra’s primary.
That means we’ve been spending a lot of money on yard signs, pens for petitioning, chairs for our brand-new field offices that open in just over a week, and more. Not to mention the costs of running ads and paying our full-time staff fair wages!
And truthfully, every dollar we spend is worth it to help us elect Alessandra. But all these expenses add up, and we won’t be able to cover them if we don’t hit important financial milestones like our upcoming End-of-Quarter goal.
[**So, please, pitch in today to help us hit our $7,349 goal. We’re asking for $5, but you can contribute any amount that you can afford.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220327-1-60&refcode2=634_59515_IaJ46G&akid=634%2E59515%2EIaJ46G)**
Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. We’ll be back in touch soon.
– Maura
Maura Curtin
Campaign Treasurer, Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?refcode=em220327-1-60&refcode2=634_59515_IaJ46G&akid=634%2E59515%2EIaJ46G)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=634%2E59515%2EIaJ46G).

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. Can I count on your help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUVfwZ_qPx2PV1Re8X-5oBi0ded_WlL9hT51EQwN9df9Q&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220327_launch&n=1) Friend, **My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common-sense to our political discourse.** As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase patriotism to serve their own vile beliefs. **I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.** Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- **and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I hope to earn your support on this next mission, and there's no time to waste. Will you help me win this race by donating to my campaign today?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUVfwZ_qPx2PV1Re8X-5oBi0ded_WlL9hT51EQwN9df9Q&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220327_launch&n=2) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUVfwZ_qPx2PV1Re8X-5oBi0ded_WlL9hT51EQwN9df9Q&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220327_launch&n=3 "DONATE NOW >> ") [DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUVfwZ_qPx2PV1Re8X-5oBi0ded_WlL9hT51EQwN9df9Q&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220327_launch&n=4)
---
**Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene isn't going to be easy.** She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused.
[**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve and that Georgia deserves better -- chip in now to help us start this campaign off on the right foot.**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUVfwZ_qPx2PV1Re8X-5oBi0ded_WlL9hT51EQwN9df9Q&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220327_launch&n=5)
Together we can accomplish great things,
Marcus Flowers

clean_body: | Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common-sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase patriotism to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. | "DONATE NOW >> " Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene isn't going to be easy. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers Paid for by Marcus for Georgia PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States "DONATE NOW >> " Marcus Flowers for Georgia · GA 30162, United States

Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your single donation that lets us knock just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign – our movement – to victory. **
The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.

| | Folks,

I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. But with our new district map, I need your help more than ever.

We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear.

**To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Everything we raise before our first FEC deadline of 2022 at the end of the month will help us go head to head with our likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP.**

[Will you please rush a donation before the end of the month? Our margin in the House to continue passing progressive legislation is so narrow — and the GOP campaign to take back my seat continues to grow stronger, especially with this new district map. They’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me and it won’t stop there. Tom Kean Jr. — the same opponent who came within 5,000 votes of winning in 2020 — is back for a rematch and the most recent polls show us in a dead heat!

**That’s why all eyes are going to be on our fundraising numbers after this FEC deadline. Everything we raise is going to go public, and will be seen as a sign of whether we’re on track to win in November!**

The choice this year is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views while always putting our country first.

But to get that message out and defend our seat, I’ll be counting on you. clean_body: | = | | Folks, I won my 2020 election by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat and thanks to you, we were able to keep our House majority. But with our new district map, I need your help more than ever. We’ve been able to achieve so much with that narrow majority in Congress – the fastest job growth in American history, a historic decline in poverty, lower health care costs, and the biggest investment in modernizing America’s infrastructure in decades. Meanwhile, the Republicans are running with no governing agenda, while calling the violence of January 6th “legitimate discourse.” The contrast, and stakes, could not be more clear. To stay on track, we have to win tough races like mine. Everything we raise before our first FEC deadline of 2022 at the end of the month will help us go head to head with our likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., for a second time and it will help us combat these constant attack ads from the GOP. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = Our margin in the House to continue passing progressive legislation is so narrow — and the GOP campaign to take back my seat continues to grow stronger, especially with this new district map. They’ve already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me and it won’t stop there. Tom Kean Jr. — the same opponent who came within 5,000 votes of winning in 2020 — is back for a rematch and the most recent polls show us in a dead heat! That’s why all eyes are going to be on our fundraising numbers after this FEC deadline. Everything we raise is going to go public, and will be seen as a sign of whether we’re on track to win in November! The choice this year is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views while always putting our country first. But to get that message out and defend our seat, I’ll be counting on you. I would be immensely grateful for your support in building a strong grassroots campaign that will win again in New Jersey’s Seventh District. = = You helped me hold our ground in 2020 – and together, we can keep moving forward! body:
This small action will make a big difference and send a clear message to Congress that we want action on gun violence prevention now.
#

We’ll cut right to the chase:
[**Will you make your first donation before our FEC fundraising deadline ends on March 31st?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-30&t=27&refcode2=1745_3935704_gUGv27&akid=1745%2E3935704%2EgUGv27)

name: Team Morganize
subject: Tomorrow is Morgan’s debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Help us wish Morgan good luck!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220327-854-footer-ak&t=2&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH)
We have an urgent request.
Morgan is getting ready to walk on stage tomorrow and debate Tim Ryan. She has been fighting hard to get Tim Ryan to debate her _since October_. Unfortunately, we’re still $15,466 away from our end-of-quarter goal, but Morgan needs to focus on the debate.
Ohioans will finally see their Democratic candidates debate on a public stage — as Republican candidates have done many times already. This is a huge opportunity for voters to hear from Morgan directly on the issues facing Ohio.
[**_Morgan has a lot to cover tomorrow, and we don’t want her to be distracted at all by the pressure of fundraising. Can you pitch in anything you can before Morgan takes the stage to show how strong our grassroots movement is?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30242?t=3&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30248?refcode=em20220327-854&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH)**
Thank you for being a part of our campaign! **And don’t forget to tune into the debate live on Monday at 11:30am ET.[Click here for all the info on where to watch.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30573?t=23&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH) **
— Team Morganize

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220327-854-footer&t=24&refcode2=854_90090_WE8vnH&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=854%2E90090%2EWE8vnH)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: a big gap to close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We've been emailing because we have a big goal to hit
#

Friend —
Can we convince you to make a contribution in response to this email to help elect Malcolm Kenyatta to the U.S. Senate?
Here’s why this request is so important:
We've been emailing because we have a big goal to hit before our final quarterly FEC fundraising deadline strikes on Thursday, and missing our goal could force us to cut back on our GOTV plan for our May primary.
What’s most important is that we generate as many individual donations as we possibly can before our deadline. Donations of any amount. Whatever people can afford.
The number of people who donate is what’s important to us and to Malcolm because it shows how many people are a part of our big, bold coalition for change — and it shows the naysayers counting us out that we have what it takes to win.
So we need A LOT of donations in a short time, and we still have a big gap to close to hit our goal by Thursday. That’s why we’re trying so hard to convince you:
[Can you make a $3 contribution to Malcolm's campaign for Senate before our final quarterly FEC deadline? Malcolm needs you now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441543/337214828/-358086307?refcode2=03b1d248-e5ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220327-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2IxZDI0OC1lNWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xCQYm3FM7DQlVDz71yS7pGEDWIh2ascTZNbLCJh6q8=)

Team Malcolm

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a preview of what would be in store for us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
What we heard from Republicans during Judge Jackson’s confirmation hearings is in many ways a preview of what would be in store for us.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441617/337215206/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220327-1-b&refcode2=6cddcec2-e5ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=+ZgZUat8gs7lg5pEFhx65e/2gsP3TlnGjlgrFYfOfMlKOSEEFNple6h7iO9VlzPZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2RkY2VjMi1lNWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd6dGmSqUM-gWf_6_d68khuOwdbdhWFbd0mgJnt03r0=)
Friends,
It’s been quite a week — the confirmation hearings of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, President Biden’s historic meetings with our NATO and European allies on stopping Putin’s war of aggression, and new stunning revelations regarding the January 6th insurrection.
Americans are still trying to get their lives back on track after two excruciating COVID-19 years and, understandably for many, the upcoming 2022 election is not at the top of their minds. But the truth is that IT NEEDS TO BE, because the outcome of virtually every issue we face right now is at stake.
If we fall back into the hands of a Republican majority we will be in real trouble. What we heard from GOP Senators during Judge Jackson’s confirmation hearings is a preview of what would be in store for us — with one major exception: they would control the gavel and block the final vote.
That’s why I am reaching out on a Sunday afternoon to humbly ask you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to support my re-election to the United States Senate and our work to ensure that Mitch McConnell does not flip one seat from Blue to Red in 2022.
We have an official FEC deadline coming up on Thursday and when our fundraising numbers go public Republicans will see them as a reflection of the strength and commitment of support for the work ahead.
Can I count on you?
**[Please make a donation of $3 or any amount before our deadline at midnight on Thursday to help us build a winning team to engage every registered voter across Maryland in this important midterm election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441618/337215207/-149995803?source=em220327-1-b&refcode2=6cddcec2-e5ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=+ZgZUat8gs7lg5pEFhx65e/2gsP3TlnGjlgrFYfOfMlKOSEEFNple6h7iO9VlzPZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2RkY2VjMi1lNWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd6dGmSqUM-gWf_6_d68khuOwdbdhWFbd0mgJnt03r0=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441619/337215208/-149995803?source=em220327-1-b&refcode2=6cddcec2-e5ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=+ZgZUat8gs7lg5pEFhx65e/2gsP3TlnGjlgrFYfOfMlKOSEEFNple6h7iO9VlzPZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2RkY2VjMi1lNWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd6dGmSqUM-gWf_6_d68khuOwdbdhWFbd0mgJnt03r0=)**
Thank you for being part of the fight for a better America — for everyone. I’m honored to have your support.
Onwards,
Chris

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4910022e-12ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/6cddcec2-e5ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2RkY2VjMi1lNWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd6dGmSqUM-gWf_6_d68khuOwdbdhWFbd0mgJnt03r0=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.
