subject: We’ll get straight to the point:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Thursday is our first Federal Elections Commission deadline since a Republican Trump appointee joined the race for Senate in Vermont. In a moment we’ll explain why this is so important.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=150%2E61531%2EUKp2_a)
Hello,
We’ll get straight to the point: Thursday is our first Federal Elections Commission deadline since a Republican Trump appointee joined the race for Senate in Vermont. In a moment we’ll explain why this is so important. [**But before we dive in, can you chip in $15 right away to help elect Peter and protect our Senate majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1701?t=3&akid=150%2E61531%2EUKp2_a)
With Republicans already identifying this open seat in Vermont as one of their targets, we know they’ll spare no expense in this race. After Thursday's end-of-quarter deadline, we’ll have to report exactly how much we’ve raised this year—and they’ll be watching. It’ll be up to us to show them just how strong our team is.
This election could decide whether Mitch McConnell is majority leader again—or we can hold onto our Democratic Senate and get more results for families. Let’s keep Peter’s progressive voice in Washington, where he’s been leading the fight and delivering real accomplishments as Vermont’s congressman.
[**If you can, please chip in a $15 donation to help reach our goal by midnight on March 31 and send a message to Republicans that we’re ready to win.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1701?t=4&akid=150%2E61531%2EUKp2_a)

name: President Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: I'm asking, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
As you read this, we are working hard to deliver for the American people.
| | | **America is moving again -- and we can’t slow down now.** With the midterm elections just around the corner, it is crucial that Senate Democrats stay on track of their fundraising goals so we can defend our hard-earned majority and keep building on the progress we’ve made so far.

Our nation is on the road to recovery. Just last year, we were able to pass the _American Rescue Plan_ and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Legislation like this has only been possible thanks to the hard work this team put into flipping the Senate early last year.

Vice President Harris and I ran for office with a new economic vision for America. With a strong majority, we can continue to build the economy from the bottom up and the middle out, not from the top down.

**With Senate control split 50-50, losing just one seat could flip the balance of power.** The hard work we put in now will determine just how aggressively Senate Democrats can campaign to keep control of the majority.

**You showed me the power of a true grassroots movement during my campaign, and that’s why I’m coming to you directly in this crucial moment: If you’re able, can you rush a $5 donation to the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline?**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7151?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)

---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/7151?amount=5&t=6&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/7151?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)
---

There couldn’t be a more important time to redouble our efforts to organize, update our tech and data, and protect the right to vote so we can protect our Senate majority. It’s work we can only accomplish together, so I’ll ask once more:

[**Can you contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, to the DSCC before Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline? I know this isn’t an easy ask, but I promise you every dollar will be put right to use.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7151?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)

With gratitude,

Joe

Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
President of the United States

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7151?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail-Pros-sl1&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)

* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-biden?refcode=DPE-FD-20220327-PresidentJosephRBidenJr-DSCCQ1FundraisingEmail&t=1&refcode2=3574_9716520_zsDtDX&akid=3574%2E9716520%2EzsDtDX)**.

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: Just four days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441852/337217229/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM1MGJmNi1lNmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AMSQ95T65K3Z-AvXo1CqCoc9eMOZHA1UifVqCjSJqhk=&emci=dfa879b6-35ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba350bf6-e6ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, **Our most crucial campaign deadline thus far is the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, March 31.** I'm truly thankful for all that you've done to keep this campaign going. It's been the honor of a lifetime to gain the support of so many people like you. So this time, I'm not asking for large checks. **[I'm asking for $3.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441853/337217231/924952270?refcode=2022-03-27-eoq3&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba350bf6-e6ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM1MGJmNi1lNmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AMSQ95T65K3Z-AvXo1CqCoc9eMOZHA1UifVqCjSJqhk=)** **[Yup. Just $3.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43441854/337217232/924952270?refcode=2022-03-27-eoq3&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba350bf6-e6ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM1MGJmNi1lNmFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AMSQ95T65K3Z-AvXo1CqCoc9eMOZHA1UifVqCjSJqhk=)** It's not just about how much we raise. It's also about how many people show up and join our movement by contributing to it. _And that's the way it should be._ Look, Peter, we have just 90 days until the June 28th primary to make our case to the voters. The coming days, weeks, and months are going to be a whirlwind. Our campaign office will be buzzing with volunteers and interns making calls and stuffing envelopes. Our TV ads will air in a few weeks. And I'll criss-cross the five counties that make up our district, meet voters, and share my message. And you know what, Peter? I wouldn't want it any other way. You see, Peter, elections aren't about the horse-race. Not to me anyway. **Elections are about you.** Running for office is kind of like a job interview. Only I won't have one boss; I'll have hundreds of thousands of bosses. It's up to me to prove myself to voters and _earn_ the support of my constituents. My goal is to serve you and our community well. It's my job between now and Election Day to prove to you and the thousands of people who will cast ballots that I'm the guy you want representing you in Congress. And by the way, in a democracy, _that's the way it should be._ What I love most about running for public office is that you surround yourself with people. Your closest advisors become your closest friends. Your volunteers are just as committed to the campaign as you are. And of course, meeting voters provides the opportunity to learn about the lives of all kinds of people whom you hope to represent. **You can't win an election on your own, and you shouldn't want to.** It's an experience that's as humbling as it is thrilling. Many thanks and more to come, _Josh_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Peter, Our most crucial campaign deadline thus far is the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, March 31. I'm truly thankful for all that you've done to keep this campaign going. It's been the honor of a lifetime to gain the support of so many people like you. So this time, I'm not asking for large checks. = = It's not just about how much we raise. It's also about how many people show up and join our movement by contributing to it. And that's the way it should be. Look, Peter, we have just 90 days until the June 28th primary to make our case to the voters. The coming days, weeks, and months are going to be a whirlwind. Our campaign office will be buzzing with volunteers and interns making calls and stuffing envelopes. Our TV ads will air in a few weeks. And I'll criss-cross the five counties that make up our district, meet voters, and share my message. And you know what, Peter? I wouldn't want it any other way. You see, Peter, elections aren't about the horse-race. Not to me anyway. Elections are about you. Running for office is kind of like a job interview. Only I won't have one boss; I'll have hundreds of thousands of bosses. It's up to me to prove myself to voters and earn the support of my constituents. My goal is to serve you and our community well. It's my job between now and Election Day to prove to you and the thousands of people who will cast ballots that I'm the guy you want representing you in Congress. And by the way, in a democracy, that's the way it should be. What I love most about running for public office is that you surround yourself with people. Your closest advisors become your closest friends. Your volunteers are just as committed to the campaign as you are. And of course, meeting voters provides the opportunity to learn about the lives of all kinds of people whom you hope to represent. You can't win an election on your own, and you shouldn't want to. It's an experience that's as humbling as it is thrilling. Many thanks and more to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. name: Dinner with President Trump via Team Scalise
subject: Would you like to dine with President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This calls for the celebration of a millenia
Peter, if you could sit across from President Trump at the dinner table while being served fine wine in the nicest restaurant in Texas, _what would you talk about?_
Until now, many could only dream of meeting their America First hero...
But that all changes today for you, Peter, because we're extending you an opportunity that any proud Republican would take in a heartbeat.
**Would you like to dine with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump?**
_Your Reservation with President Trump:_
[**PENDING**] _Trump Patriot:_
[**CONFIRMED**] ****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959197:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r)****
---
Few Republicans have been selected for the potential to win this prestigious honor. And only ONE will sit face-to-face with President Trump.
That could be you Peter, but we'll never know if you're the lucky winner unless you confirm your interest right now. The sole winner of this prestigious honor will be selected soon, and we would hate to see you miss your chance.
****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959197:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r)****
_**If dining with President Trump isn 't enough to convince you, maybe this will...**_
_We 'll pay for your flight to Dallas, Texas. We'll pay for your hotel. AND we'll cover every penny of your VIP dinner experience with Donald J. Trump._
Imagine the smile on your face when you dine with the man who always puts our country first.
_THAT is an experience no one could ever forget._
[**Make it a reality today and confirm your interest in dining with President Trump, before you lose your chance forever.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959197:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r)
In kind,
**Dinner with President Trump Notifications** | _Sent via Team Scalise_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003
---
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution [use this form.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959197:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r) To enter without making a contribution, [click here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959198:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 16th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the Team Scalise, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [Official Rules.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959199:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r) The Sponsor is Team Scalise, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.
Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.
320 First Street SE
Washington, DC 20003
[Privacy Policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59959200:J7cpGLoNP:m:1:3317145305:CDD8CA9E36D279825F52CA8F8B1D8331:r)

Team Sonia

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: I need your help to take on some of the nation’s most restrictive voting laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
Hi team,
My name is Chelsea Clark, and I’m running to be Ohio’s next Secretary of State.
For years, state leaders have been trying to make it harder to vote. I’m ready to be the Secretary of State who will champion a Democracy for Ohio Agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
This is going to be an uphill battle, but if we work together, I know we can win. Will you rush a contribution of $20 right now to help DASS hit their $75,000 Q1 grassroots goal? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
I'm a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. I’m running to be Ohio’s Secretary of State because our democracy is under attack.
The Ohio GOP has enacted some of the nation’s strictest voter-suppression laws, mirroring the rest of the nation.
Yet even that isn’t enough to satisfy some elements of the party - our incumbent secretary is being primaried from the right for not buying wholesale into the craziest of conspiracy theories. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
I’m running to put an end to these attacks on our democracy, and DASS is fighting like hell to help elect me and other Democratic leaders across the country who will stand for our democracy.
But they can’t do it alone – they have a critical $75,000 Q1 grassroots goal they must hit by the deadline on Thursday, or they risk being drowned out by the far-right and their vast resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
Team, we can stop the far-right and save our democracy. But it’s going to be a tough battle. Will you rush $20 right now to help DASS hit their Q1 goal and defeat the far-right this November? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?refcode=EM_FR_032722_B3_AC_30D&amount=100]
Together,
Chelsea Clark
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]
This email was sent to: email. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our Democratic agenda. If you no longer wish to receive these emails click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/47d7fc9a-70ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/d9ea7a7d-08ae-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWVhN2E3ZC0wOGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9C1x1UyjzsVLZzwZjZbNCXT-HFtIo59fCvc_VMAkuwo=&id=130343606 .

| | Derek, I’m running for reelection to keep Georgia blue and deliver meaningful progress for our country – **but Donald Trump just came to Georgia for the second time in six months to rally his MAGA base and boost my potential GOP opponent, and I need your help to fight back.** National Republicans have already spent millions smearing me with attack ads to flip this seat and take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. And with experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _POLITICO_ saying that Democrats' chances of defending our majority hinge on winning this race, there's too much at stake to lose here. **But I'll be honest: Trump's visit and the GOP's huge spending spree could put my seat – and our entire Senate majority – at risk unless we fight back immediately. That's why I've set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in now:** [_**Derek – will you split $10 or more ASAP to fight back against GOP attacks, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43448443/337248898/977858527?refcode=mw_em_220327_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWVhN2E3ZC0wOGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek-6H4ycu1kqfhLhq3-GH7jsWmSHaoRTj3urvRmJqH8=) Thank you for always stepping up when I need you most, Rev. name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: My Fellow Democrats
body:
We need your support to get us to our goal!

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_ask&n=1)
---
Peter, My fellow Washingtonian as we close in on the official start of the 2022 primaries, I need your help. I have always been a Democrat, one in the truest sense of ensuring equity and equality for all, fighting for racial justice, and supporting efforts to get Medicare for all. Two weeks ago, the State Democratic Party essentially blocked my ability to Obtain access to the party's data by instilling improbable requirements. [You can see my press release here.](https://www.nick4wa.com/sleister_exposes_washdems?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_ask&n=2) **[Today I am making a big ask of you; I am asking you to help us take down the corporate establishment by donating $150 right now.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzv-BZ1a3iO8i9iTpzDioaeBMYhF9cF8RNRhd7sXPmF9aA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_ask&n=3)** I know it is a big ask, but I wouldn't be making it if we didn't need it. We can #BeTheChange and fight for Medicare for all, build equity and equality, enact real change, and make Washington and our country a better place. Between Patty Murray, Tiffany Smiley, and myself, I am the only Senate Candidate fighting for Medicare for All! **[Will you donate $150 now to help us reach our clean_body: We need your support to get us to our goal! | Peter, My fellow Washingtonian as we close in on the official start of the 2022 primaries, I need your help. I have always been a Democrat, one in the truest sense of ensuring equity and equality for all, fighting for racial justice, and supporting efforts to get Medicare for all. Two weeks ago, the State Democratic Party essentially blocked my ability to Obtain access to the party's data by instilling improbable requirements. I know it is a big ask, but I wouldn't be making it if we didn't need it. We can #BeTheChange and fight for Medicare for all, build equity and equality, enact real change, and make Washington and our country a better place. Between Patty Murray, Tiffany Smiley, and myself, I am the only Senate Candidate fighting for Medicare for All! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Nicolaus Sleister Candidate for the U.S. Senate Washington Join us on Social Media! Tag us with #Nick4WA Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2022 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER · 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256, Puyallup, WA 98375, United States

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Here’s why this end-of-quarter deadline matters so much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43442805/337221051/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220327eoq2_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWFhN2VkMy1lN2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqLzMCsl31hsJ36_Rpj8BglY0FY0rw24YC_zzEN6FfQ=)

Friend, I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails this week, and I can tell you why: **next Thursday is not only the end of March, but it’s the end of the first financial quarter of 2022.** Let me explain why that matters. At the end of every quarter, congressional campaigns like ours have to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). Those numbers — like total amount raised, average donation amount, and number of grassroots donors — measure the strength of our campaign, and they go public for everyone (including the GOP) to see. **That makes this our most important deadline yet.** If we’re going to win the June primary and defeat far-right incumbent Yvette Herrell in November, we have to show we have the resources and people-power to do it. From events, to ads, to get-out-the-vote efforts, we have a whole lot of work ahead of us, and it’s all going to take a lot of money to accomplish. I’m running for Congress to give NM-02 a true representative of the people who will fight for our public lands, affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs, action on climate, and so much more. [**Will you help us close this quarter out strong before Thursday’s midnight FEC deadline by chipping in your first donation of $10****right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43442806/337221052/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220327eoq2_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWFhN2VkMy1lN2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqLzMCsl31hsJ36_Rpj8BglY0FY0rw24YC_zzEN6FfQ=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: RE: BREAKING: Far-right multi-millionaire eyeing NH Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw this:
| | |
---
Friend – I wanted to make sure you saw this:
**A self-funded multi-millionaire is seriously considering jumping into New Hampshire's Senate race.** With our public reporting deadline right around the corner, we can't afford to give an inch. But our fundraising numbers are not where they need to be. If we fall short of this critical goal, it could open my campaign up to a slew of GOP attacks and invite even more far-right opponents into the race.
**This is a critical moment in the campaign.** Control of the Senate hinges on New Hampshire, so we need to act now to turn this around.

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: It’s official
body:
I am running for re-election in New York’s 16th Congressional district with the goal to continue shaking up the status-quo and fighting for the progressive values we deserve.
#
Peter, it’s official.
**I’m running for re-election to represent New York’s 16th Congressional District in the House of Representatives.** I’ve been with Justice Democrats since Day 1 of my very first election — JD was by my side as I launched my campaign and when I defeated a corporate Democrat in June of 2020.
I’m humbled to continue receiving the support of Justice Democrats — and I hope to also receive your support today, as well.
In a few months, I’ll be asking my neighbors in NY-16 for their vote so we can continue causing problems for the status quo and fight for the progressive values we all deserve.
**[If you’re ready to go and fired up just like I am to grow our movement — can you split any amount between Justice Democrats and my campaign today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101058?refcode=em20220327-22582&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101058?refcode=em20220327-22582&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)**
**I’m fired up to go back to Congress, Peter.** Because the truth is, people like me aren’t often elected to Congress.
People like me — people who are Black, people who grew up in public housing, people who’ve been arrested, public school educators — aren’t typically given positions of influence and power.
**We’re not given this power, even though we’re the ones closest to the pain.**
I’ve experienced the same struggles as many of those who voted for me. I grew up in public housing and experienced first hand the result of greedy landlords and failing public housing infrastructure. I’ve seen first hand how gun violence affects our communities, our schools, and our children. And to this day, I myself am dealing with the crushing weight of student debt loans.
_I say all of this to simply explain that I understand._ And that’s not something that many of our current representatives in Congress can relate to — which leads to unjust and out of touch leadership and legislation.
**Enough is enough, Peter.**
We still have so much more work to do to fully address the racial, social, economic, and environmental inequities that exist in our communities and in our government.
As one of very few progressive leaders in Congress, I deeply recognize the gravity of our decision-making — the lives of thousands depend on our ability to find solutions to the issues we face each and every day. And unlike many representatives in Congress today, **I refuse to be pressured or swayed into making compromises for my constituents.**
With one strong challenger poised against our campaign, and a voter landscape that has shifted dramatically from the one I was elected to in 2020 due to redistricting, we cannot afford to lose our momentum or we lose our opportunity to continue fighting for change in Congress.
[As a grassroots funded campaign, our power is built and sustained by supporters like you — so, I need your support now more than ever, Peter. Please help us demonstrate the true strength of our progressive grassroots movement and split a donation of $3 today between my campaign and Justice Democrats. ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101058?refcode=em20220327-22582&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/101058?refcode=em20220327-22582&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)**
Thank you for your support, and I can’t wait to see what changes we continue to make together.
Peace and love,
Jamaal Bowman

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220327-22582-footer&t=26&refcode2=22582_1203867_Crpr--&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=22582%2E1203867%2ECrpr--)

body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
My last fundraising deadline before my election is in FOUR DAYS. Will you help my campaign come out strong in this final week by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032722_EOM_C]
Special interests and corporate PACs have been funding a lot of negative attack ads against me the last couple of weeks, but their motives are really transparent.
Corporate interests know that I won't let them exploit our workers, price out our families, and pollute our communities. So they really don't want me to win this race.
My message resonates with voters: in February, polling showed that I led all my opponents by double digits. In the Assembly, I'll back the labor movement, make sure we invest in affordable housing, improve public transportation, and find clean energy solutions to reduce our dependency on oil.
I need to be able to cut through corporate interests' smear campaign to reach potential voters before April 5th.
Hitting my fundraising goal in the next four days will ensure that I can do that. That's why I have to ask: can you give a little right now to support my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_032722_EOM_C]
Thank you!
-- Georgette

name: Nan Whaley
subject: The upcoming deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
For too long Ohio has had Republican leadership at the top that hasn’t put people first.

Team,

We’re just a few days away from one of our last deadlines before the primary, which is why **[I’m asking you to please, if you can, step up right now and contribute to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43448688/337251249/-1333475771?refcode=nw_em_220327_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxOTk0NS0wYmFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t5Dhv-QTrzCpq_x_CvnHnP1ittK2JW1CoL8tjnjEb0=)**

For too long Ohio has had Republican leadership at the top that hasn’t put people first. The pay-to-play politics dominating our capitol has resulted, in the most recent example - a billion dollar bailout of a coal plant in Indiana on your dime. Meanwhile, too many families are struggling to make ends meet.

**But I know we can do better for our state.** It's why as mayor, I worked with elected officials, community leaders, and experts to tackle the tough issues – from the opioid crisis to a broken education system to tornados.

We’re coming up on one of the biggest tests of our campaign yet, and we need to show that we have what it takes to take on Mike DeWine and win. I know we can do it – but I need your help to make it happen.

**[So please, if you can – will you chip in $5 today to help us close out March strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43448689/337251250/-1333475771?refcode=nw_em_220327_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxOTk0NS0wYmFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t5Dhv-QTrzCpq_x_CvnHnP1ittK2JW1CoL8tjnjEb0=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43448690/337251251/-1333475771?refcode=nw_em_220327_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxOTk0NS0wYmFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t5Dhv-QTrzCpq_x_CvnHnP1ittK2JW1CoL8tjnjEb0=)****

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43443228/337223375/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU1NTEwNS1lYWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AX87-pRVhFfNZSoxC98qjCSepCFZXDhdc-Jwuz1bzZA=&emci=1cae0f62-8fac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=39555105-eaad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047)

| | In about a month, Oregonians across the state will start to receive their ballots to vote in the primary elections.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43443229/337223376/1963792741?refcode=2022-03-27-eoq2&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=39555105-eaad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU1NTEwNS1lYWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AX87-pRVhFfNZSoxC98qjCSepCFZXDhdc-Jwuz1bzZA=) My team and I have been working night and day reaching out to voters across the new Sixth District. name: Team Durbin
subject: The future of the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
With so much hanging in the balance we can’t afford to lose our momentum.
#
Thursday, Senator Durbin and the Senate Judiciary Committee wrapped up Judge Jackson’s nomination hearings.
Judge Jackson has led an exceptional career and has already appeared before the Judiciary Committee three times, each time leaving with bipartisan support.
But we know from experience that if Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans had it their way, the confirmation process would be anything but fair. **So that’s why we’re asking, Peter:**
**[Will you chip in $5 to reelect our Democratic Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from taking over judicial confirmations?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43443295/337223614/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220327_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmE4MmI0YS1lYWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S67mmy6ae467Tmy6lsJ9nLN8WKT4-6Jfl0m26OuIbao=)**
With so much hanging in the balance – from defending reproductive rights to safeguarding our democracy and everything in between – we can’t afford to lose our momentum.
Defending and expanding our Senate majority this November means that Sen. Durbin and his colleagues will have more opportunities to carefully consider and confirm highly-qualified judicial appointees like Judge Jackson – including for future Supreme Court vacancies.
**[Contribute $5, or whatever you can spare, to help us defend the Democratic Senate majority against a McConnell takeover.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43443296/337223615/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220327_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmE4MmI0YS1lYWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S67mmy6ae467Tmy6lsJ9nLN8WKT4-6Jfl0m26OuIbao=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: staggering amount of dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Far-right and corporate interests are flooding North Carolina with money to try to buy this open seat.
#

WRAL just reported that Club for Growth, the far-right super PAC, is “prepared to spend whatever it takes” to win North Carolina’s Senate seat.
That’s on top of the $4 million they’ve already spent and the $10 million they’ve pledged to dump into North Carolina in _just_ the next two months.
That’s a staggering amount of money — _the most they’ve spent on any race this election cycle._
[**Rush a $3 donation to our campaign to fight back and stop them from buying this seat for Republicans. We have a critical FEC deadline in 4 days and need as much grassroots support as possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220327-1-t1&refcode2=606.357359.1PTbwp&t=1&akid=606%2E357359%2E1PTbwp)

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=606%2E357359%2E1PTbwp). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=606_357359_1PTbwp&akid=606%2E357359%2E1PTbwp) today to help us make history.
clean_body: Far-right and corporate interests are flooding North Carolina with money to try to buy this open seat. WRAL just reported that Club for Growth, the far-right super PAC, is “prepared to spend whatever it takes” to win North Carolina’s Senate seat. That’s on top of the $4 million they’ve already spent and the $10 million they’ve pledged to dump into North Carolina in just the next two months. That’s a staggering amount of money — the most they’ve spent on any race this election cycle. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Far-right and corporate interests are flooding North Carolina with money to try to buy this open seat. They know that if we win, then Democrats are almost guaranteed to hold and even expand our Senate majority. But special interests are desperate to stop that — and stop any progress on climate change, voting rights, lower prescription drug prices and more. If we don’t fight back right now to counter the influence of their big money, we could be handing this seat to Trump’s hand-picked candidate. \- Team Beasley Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

Three quick things, Peter Willis:
1. The June 28 primaries are _three months from tomorrow_ — that means we have just a little more than 90 days to get Melanie’s message out to voters, making sure they know that they can end the status quo and send a true, unbought champion for working families to Congress.

2. Internal polling shows that **more than half of voters in this district are undecided**. That means our insurgent campaign has an incredible opportunity to break through the noise. We have a plan to reach people — from Long Island all the way to Westchester — through extensive field operations, door knocking, canvassing, and phone banks. But...

3. With just a few days left to hit _our critical $20,000 end-of-quarter goal_ before the March 31 deadline, we’re just not where we need to be to be able to run the kind of voter outreach programs that we need in order to win.

The success of our campaign depends on us hitting this goal, and we’re turning to our most committed supporters — that’s you! — to help us do it. **[Can you pitch in whatever you’re able before our March 31 deadline? Even $5 or $10 goes a long way.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNrAmD5e2X3j_hFXNCxkksqdpp0btqu5sgr7OXvM_YoteUVqx9BHctvji6fM9FjPBExiSnv3GbF40ekSMBT4VdoUzVj8ZJmlsGEM553E490SY-ItRlijhu3nE9ZIGr4_TRhjuSdPK_d3sQ2eZ5-I6P7FdaDotv3nzWu-g9WAGvo6OUFZ2D6G6_9phh4XQSOb6yLrpdosJwCB86PnNAqPTpO3hvhOwnYuX6DweCB_8cCaQgoCtvVAe9jr2iAfWBB1Wz6tXbnsCHvt1oQ7QrmBUXAfYSaVVLNCMrxjOF54BuTqpgaKTtp-ivajEHTYy_KSJtsCPX0nQXPFnWaiqcqhiFMuWyGKjQ5Aiqm0_sopaSdN2/3kp/I9HiXHp1SOiPKbKo59ZG3g/h1/RIg3gPiHcBbEf4zF43nqb4YVD2ZlKzZTjOfkyVQdcv8)**

clean_body: | | | | Three quick things, Peter Willis: 1. The June 28 primaries are three months from tomorrow — that means we have just a little more than 90 days to get Melanie’s message out to voters, making sure they know that they can end the status quo and send a true, unbought champion for working families to Congress. 2. Internal polling shows that more than half of voters in this district are undecided. That means our insurgent campaign has an incredible opportunity to break through the noise. We have a plan to reach people — from Long Island all the way to Westchester — through extensive field operations, door knocking, canvassing, and phone banks. But... 3. With just a few days left to hit our critical $20,000 end-of-quarter goal before the March 31 deadline, we’re just not where we need to be to be able to run the kind of voter outreach programs that we need in order to win. The success of our campaign depends on us hitting this goal, and we’re turning to our most committed supporters — that’s you! — to help us do it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Charles Booker
subject: They don’t hear us. They don’t know our truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I wanted to
share this headline that I recently saw on the news with you:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327-1692&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1692_346206_RZdzx2&akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2 ]Democrats question electability of Black candidates

The article talked about how Democrats rely heavily on Black voters to win
elections — yet when Black candidates run for office, even to this day,
are plagued with questions around “electability”.

So whenever someone says Kentucky will never elect a Black person to U.S.
Senate — whenever I see headlines like the one I just shared — I know it’s
because they don’t see us.

They don’t hear us. They don’t know our truth. And whether or not my own
“electability” is put into question, I know this to be true:

Kentuckians from the hood to the holler will organize and be ready to
transform our future this year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327-1692&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1692_346206_RZdzx2&akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2 ]Peter, I’d
be honored if you could join us by chipping in $5 to our
campaign today — especially as we rush to reach our ambitious $200,000
goal before the end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline on March 31.
Please, chip in:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327-1692&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1692_346206_RZdzx2&akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2 ]DONATE NOW →

Since we launched our campaign last July — and even long before that —
Kentuckians from urban and rural communities have been organizing. We
stand together, lean into love, mobilize around our common bonds, and do
this work, all so we can transform our future.

I know my neighbors in Kentucky deserve a Senator who won’t disrespect and
embarrass us. We deserve a Senator who will deliver results, not chase
conspiracies and stir up chaos. We deserve a Senator who actually cares.

Peter, I will
be that Senator. “Electability” be damned.

In order to get there, we need to build a widespread, diverse coalition of
voters. We need to organize in every corner of Kentucky and center our
conversations around the challenges too many families in Kentucky face
right now. And we need a powerful, grassroots funded movement fueling
these efforts to organize and mobilize enough folks to take back our
power.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327-1692&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1692_346206_RZdzx2&akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2 ]We can do this. We have the opportunity to make history here in
Kentucky. But I need you to make this possible — and your support right
now, when we have the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign
to date, is so crucial. Please, chip in now — $5 or
whatever you can.

Thank you,
Peter. I can’t say it enough.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220327-1692-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1692_346206_RZdzx2&akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1692%2E346206%2ERZdzx2

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Every single donation counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

November might sound like a long time from now, but the reality is that
it’s critical that we campaign as vigorously right now as we will in
October. In order to defeat Greg Abbott and his $50 million in the bank,
we need to seriously increase our fundraising. That’s why we’re asking you
today:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54377?refcode=ema20220327-182325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=182325%2E444211%2EyUvota ]If you
can afford it, will you invest in our campaign’s organizing work by
making your first donation to
help Beto defeat Greg Abbott?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54377?refcode=ema20220327-182325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=182325%2E444211%2EyUvota ]Contribute $3

Every time someone chips in, it means that Beto is able to drive to more
counties and that we can hire more organizers, run more ads, and build the
campaign that will defeat Greg Abbott in November.

The way that we will win this race is by showing up in places that
Republicans have taken for granted and Democrats have historically written
off. As governor, Beto will serve the interests of the people in all 254
counties of Texas, not corporate special interests.

Whether or not we reach our $1,200,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal
will impact our budgets for the next few weeks when we need to be making
heavy investments in our on-the-ground campaign work so we can win in
November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54377?refcode=ema20220327-182325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=182325%2E444211%2EyUvota ]Let’s finish this first quarter of the election year strong. Please
make your gift now to help us reach our $1,200,000 goal. Every single
donation counts.

Thank you,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=182325%2E444211%2EyUvota

body:
We set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in now.
#
Peter, I’m running for reelection to keep Georgia blue and deliver meaningful progress for our country – **but Donald Trump just came to Georgia for the second time in six months to rally his MAGA base and boost my potential GOP opponent, and I need your help to fight back.**
National Republicans have already spent millions smearing me with attack ads to flip this seat and take back the Senate for Mitch McConnell. And with experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _POLITICO_ saying that Democrats' chances of defending our majority hinge on winning this race, there's too much at stake to lose here.
**But I'll be honest: Trump's visit and the GOP's huge spending spree could put my seat – and our entire Senate majority – at risk unless we fight back immediately. That's why I've set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight, and I'm asking you to chip in now:**

[**I need a quick favor.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=ed2992e787d0466a9b94e769e643f528&_e=pjaMoPxVnJfzcQmBiHYj_yMfUZ7BhFD_UlN8s2-eNiug1B9Ewsu6a-cyiMDDzNeaq3fJXMbB4ErvMQ4BwQfTq5xNQpipRwlUeWy2duWBqllZZ3Rlo4OtuA3VaaGhMsS9cbTLybUO6lyKH3Hrrhumavh9hF8jIWmVqXpTvYsKaAHG5s3BztqukURsabcE0uqvQa8DV7vkrBTUl1-qQ6RyI3QIYG2dUDITbzBoOCv3a7rEBx9wkfjyDI07mFRjtI-QOhr9ExLx2lS2MuIubi3o8DVQxbL1X5MdzJjVdjZ1M1yN9ymbuyG08hauiYhc_mjK3MOnxq93hvM_oG0aeTnv2Dw9mU2UxYBXL3RKhxmOUAMCiMvOJbBS8_l2Mh0uqi5z)

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. **We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet** , and I don’t know what we’re going to do.

I’m sure you know how bad things are...

My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me.

**Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda.**

This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% _and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time._

| Peter,

[_**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to our grassroots campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43445107/337232362/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220327-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzFjOTU4YS1mM2FkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dtn9UKkmXXomPByU_WWg4s8nMKlGxixAOKelv0b0_Lc=) But first, as a supporter, you deserve to know why it’s so important that my team and I keep emailing to ask for contributions.

Right now, we’re approaching our final end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day, and the clock is ticking.

That means we need all hands on deck to cross the finish line, Peter. In the remaining 93 days until Election Day, our campaign will invest heavily in organizing and advertising to reach voters with our message, but we still have more work to do to raise the money we need to meet our full budget.

And this upcoming reporting deadline is an opportunity to show the strength of our campaign heading into this final stretch. So we’re setting an ambitious grassroots goal to raise $15,000 before Thursday night’s FEC deadline.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlm229rrsb6iv44h8i64e1oqpnku5oi5bdu1a2so_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj4d73esp64plkmgonfc74elhmep9mc5gn1ob466p38ppkehoj4pbic1g6ddjnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j7ap5jcdjr4sb665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ge2p33cdi6eoh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvq33dudl2tfor4tj5k04fh4vcanvgc5fhihb1tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5i66or4cth2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt4uosqhffhvnv81kl7ef3b064lhnbadhd9ornpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5i66or4cth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbhsspc2q85ssdofuc0igrpesv35rmf6nksgmf98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5i66or4cth2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zddicb3lsfi8oi7i1c9i0p6ad405vscr03m2r7a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5i66or4cth2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze47hedd69co0if7skotj2cofnpginc4bmqs6dlg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s5i66or4cth2bs)

| Peter, it’s Stan again, Valerie’s husband. I know it’s the weekend, so I’ll keep this short. [_**But I wanted to suggest three reasons you should contribute $3 to my wife Valerie’s campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449562/337255811/44571083?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220327-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNmU3OS0xNWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCeS24ziF9XMIfwTKMtDvtGwdXmUbFv1F4Cjj2C1CRk=)
1. Valerie has a **proven record of getting things done**. While serving in the North Carolina state House and state Senate, Valerie passed bipartisan legislation to help folks in rural areas get improved healthcare access and end the practice of child marriage.
2. **Valerie is a champion for education and educators**. On the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board, she successfully advocated for making significant repairs on old school buildings, building more schools to address growth in the county, and increased course offerings.
3. Valerie cares deeply about our community. She’s lived in Orange County her entire life — she’s been my sweetheart since we met at Chapel Hill High School! **Valerie understands the people who live here and will work tirelessly to represent them.**

[_**Valerie is the representative NC-04 needs. Please, join me in supporting Valerie’s campaign for Congress by contributing $3 now.→**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449563/337255812/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220327-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNmU3OS0xNWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCeS24ziF9XMIfwTKMtDvtGwdXmUbFv1F4Cjj2C1CRk=)

name: Rushern Baker
subject: the Commanders
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
The notion that a new stadium be built with the financial burden landing on the backs of Maryland taxpayers is ridiculous. The new home for the Washington Commanders should be their current home, right here in Prince George’s County. This project would pay for itself, while continuing to provide revenue streams and jobs in the most diverse precinct in the most diverse state in America.
A downtown Prince George’s Business Improvement District surrounding FedEx Field would easily rival the Capitol Riverfront Business Improvement District in the District of Columbia. We could create the kind of mixed-use “mini-city” that Prince George’s County deserves, including an economic hub of entertainment, retail, restaurants, office, and residential, with the possibility of attracting a new Commanders dome stadium. The land around FedEx Field owned by the Washington Commanders alone is approximately 250 acres, with other nearby unused parcels available as well. The Commanders already own the land around the stadium, while, if they move to either Virginia or the District, they’d have to acquire it. That’s Prince George's County’s home field advantage.
If I’m elected as Governor, I will work for the PEOPLE of Maryland. That is my promise. Join me? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

body:
| We have a BIG endorsement to share. Hey team, Team Cranley-Fedor is hard at work in these final weeks of the primary race — check out these headlines from the past week!
* * *
**Ohio Association of Professional Fire Fighters endorses Cranley/Fedor ticket for governor** — _The Chronicle-Telegram_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43445284/337233062/1464435311?refcode=ea.5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzUxYjYzOC1mNGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TU7TYUkqXMAAsmkihta-FgZ2TGUVT26QIn8t7SMZq6I=&emci=d38aba54-99ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) This week, the Ohio Association of Professional Fire Fighters announced its endorsement of John and Teresa in Ohio’s gubernatorial race! **The OAPFF said John’s record as a two-term Cincinnati mayor "proves his strong commitment to keeping communities safe."** We know John and Teresa won’t let us down, and we’re incredibly grateful for this latest endorsement.
* * *

* * *
**Mark Your Calendars: The Ohio Gubernatorial Debate is Tuesday, March 29th** In partnership with the Ohio Debate Commission, the City Club of Cleveland will be providing a live stream of the Democratic party gubernatorial primary debate with candidates John Cranley, former Mayor of Cincinnati, and Nan Whaley, Mayor of Dayton. The debate will run from 7 to 8 p.m. and will be held at Central State University in Xenia, Ohio. **[Click here for more information on tickets and on how to submit a question for this debate>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43445288/337233066/-1338465254?refcode=ea.5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzUxYjYzOC1mNGFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TU7TYUkqXMAAsmkihta-FgZ2TGUVT26QIn8t7SMZq6I=&emci=d38aba54-99ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5c51b638-f4ad-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289)**
* * *
**Ohio governor's race: John Cranley wants to pay for jobs with marijuana. Would that work?** — _Cincinnati Enquirer_ John and Teresa’s vision for cannabis legalization would generate at least $350 million for jobs right here in Ohio.

The OAPFF said John’s record as a two-term Cincinnati mayor "proves his strong commitment to keeping communities safe." We know John and Teresa won’t let us down, and we’re incredibly grateful for this latest endorsement. clean_body: Sorry to bother you today, but it's important. | | Dear Friend - It's been a busy few months. I've been in Columbia fighting hard for my constituents, while working day and night to protect South Carolina women from Governor McMaster and his Republican buddies rolling back critical health care protections. In the midst of all this, I happened to also make a little history when I filed to run to replace Governor McMaster and his failed policies. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: My campaign team wants me to tell you- juggling all these hats has left me less time to make fundraising calls. That's where you come in. As we've said since the beginning- our race is powered by the people. We are nearing the end of the quarter and we need to show folks watching this race that when the future of our state is on the line, the people step up. I hope you'll join my growing campaign made up of everyday people who believe real change is possible. With gratitude, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. name: Doug White
subject: Trade and Our Future / El comercio y nuestro futuro
body:
Podemos tener un fuerte comercio exterior sin causar dependencia exterior. Nuestra nación ha intercambiado empleos bien remunerados e
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/faN-8QU0G/c?w=V5MlhO7zEdlm8MSWX0F4NovUeeAmn2e3TtjSe0H0q7o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2ZhTi04UVUwRz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Trade and Our Future / El comercio y nuestro futuro
---
| |
---
| | Podemos tener un fuerte comercio exterior sin causar dependencia exterior. Nuestra nación ha intercambiado empleos bien remunerados e invirtiendo en infraestructura por mano de obra y bienes más baratos. Ahora estamos recibiendo una dura lección a medida que aumentan los precios de la gasolina, la inflación se come nuestros cheques de pago, nuestra infraestructura se desmorona y los trabajos con salario mínimo se consideran "buenos" trabajos. Vivimos en una economía global próspera, y eso es bueno para nosotros de muchas maneras. Nuestro liderazgo en la política y el comercio mundiales es invaluable para brindar equilibrio y proteger el libre comercio, pero nunca debemos permitir que nuestro importante papel como líder mundial nos deje débiles en casa. Cuando sea elegido, mi plan describe la construcción de la infraestructura, las comunidades y las industrias de Washington; proporcionar protección económica y seguridad, y construir un futuro más fuerte y audaz.
---
| |
---
| | We can have strong foreign trade without causing foreign dependence. Our nation has traded good paying jobs and investing in infrastructure for cheaper labor and goods. We are now being taught a hard lesson as gas prices rise, inflation eats away our paychecks, our infrastructure crumbles, and minimum wage jobs are considered “good” jobs. We live in a thriving global economy, and that is good for us in many ways. Our leadership in global politics and trade is invaluable to provide balance and protect free trade, but we must never let our important role as world leader leave us weak at home. When elected, my plan outlines building Washington’s infrastructure, communities, and industries; providing economic protection and security, and building a stronger, bolder future.
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | White Salmon fundraiser. We were the guests of Larry and Patty at their beautiful home. About 30 people attended and we had a lively discussion on infrastructure, housing, healthcare and more. We have the ability to make great changes, we just need the leadership.
---
| Thank you Michael Lawrence and Nancy Newberry from Tieton. Michael opened his warehouse, which he converted into a multi-use space, to about 40 people for a meet, greet and give. Good food, great people and dancing. It was a fun evening for everyone.
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Town Halls every week! Join us in person or virtual. Everyone is welcome. Please RSVP on our [Events Page](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/faN-8QU0G/c?w=XWIdq2-qbwYpI8Uh2i5jP9U_OFdMgFC3IA07Bvikp44.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50IiwiciI6IjVhMTI3MzNlLTIwODgtNDc4MC05NmZmLWI2Y2JkZjY4MTczNyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9). Our next in person Town Hall is at the Twisp Grange in Okanogan County this Thursday March 31st. More information [here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/faN-8QU0G/c?w=eqiB3dVvwTggfKLpH8NK4yeIBP9usmZtB-l7s9eTJoE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL2V2ZW50LWRldGFpbHMvb2thbm9nYW4tY291bnR5LXRvd24taGFsbC1pbi1wZXJzb24tYW5kLXZpcnR1YWwiLCJyIjoiNWExMjczM2UtMjA4OC00NzgwLTk2ZmYtYjZjYmRmNjgxNzM3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0).

However you want to contribute we are grateful to have your support. clean_body: Podemos tener un fuerte comercio exterior sin causar dependencia exterior. Nuestra nación ha intercambiado empleos bien remunerados e | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Trade and Our Future / El comercio y nuestro futuro | | | | Podemos tener un fuerte comercio exterior sin causar dependencia exterior. Nuestra nación ha intercambiado empleos bien remunerados e invirtiendo en infraestructura por mano de obra y bienes más baratos. Ahora estamos recibiendo una dura lección a medida que aumentan los precios de la gasolina, la inflación se come nuestros cheques de pago, nuestra infraestructura se desmorona y los trabajos con salario mínimo se consideran "buenos" trabajos. Vivimos en una economía global próspera, y eso es bueno para nosotros de muchas maneras. Nuestro liderazgo en la política y el comercio mundiales es invaluable para brindar equilibrio y proteger el libre comercio, pero nunca debemos permitir que nuestro importante papel como líder mundial nos deje débiles en casa. Cuando sea elegido, mi plan describe la construcción de la infraestructura, las comunidades y las industrias de Washington; proporcionar protección económica y seguridad, y construir un futuro más fuerte y audaz. | | | | We can have strong foreign trade without causing foreign dependence. Our nation has traded good paying jobs and investing in infrastructure for cheaper labor and goods. We are now being taught a hard lesson as gas prices rise, inflation eats away our paychecks, our infrastructure crumbles, and minimum wage jobs are considered “good” jobs. We live in a thriving global economy, and that is good for us in many ways. Our leadership in global politics and trade is invaluable to provide balance and protect free trade, but we must never let our important role as world leader leave us weak at home. When elected, my plan outlines building Washington’s infrastructure, communities, and industries; providing economic protection and security, and building a stronger, bolder future. | | | | | | | White Salmon fundraiser. We were the guests of Larry and Patty at their beautiful home. About 30 people attended and we had a lively discussion on infrastructure, housing, healthcare and more. We have the ability to make great changes, we just need the leadership. | Thank you Michael Lawrence and Nancy Newberry from Tieton. Michael opened his warehouse, which he converted into a multi-use space, to about 40 people for a meet, greet and give. Good food, great people and dancing. It was a fun evening for everyone. | | | | | | | Town Halls every week! Join us in person or virtual. Everyone is welcome. Please RSVP on our . Our next in person Town Hall is at the Twisp Grange in Okanogan County this Thursday March 31st. More information . | We are grass-roots run campaign. Phone banking, door knocking, letter writing, filing out endorsement questionnaires, house parties and more. However you want to contribute we are grateful to have your support. name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m running against an insurrectionist.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

On January 6th, 2021, I was teaching my students, trying to distract them
from the fact that an angry mob was invading the halls of Congress.

On the other hand, here’s what my Republican opponent, Sandy Smith, was
doing:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46830?t=1001&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi ][IMG]

On January 6th, Sandy Smith was at the Capitol — proudly showing her
support for Donald Trump, supporting the violence, and participating in
the intimidation.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46830?t=1002&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi ]Sandy Smith is an insurrectionist — and that’s just the start. Can you
make a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today before March 31st
to help us meet our end-of-quarter online goal of $40,000, defeat Sandy
Smith, and make sure the NC-01 House seat stays blue?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46963?refcode=em20220327-1031&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi ]Donate $5

Here’s more about what we’re up against. Sandy Smith:

* Has already been endorsed by far-right Republicans including Madison
Cawthorn, Paul Gosar, and General Michael Flynn.
* Calls me a “communist” for my commitment to progressive policies that
will support and uplift working people in North Carolina and beyond.
* Opposes both a minimum wage increase and universal healthcare.
* Has #ProTrump #ProWall and #MAGA in her Twitter bio.

It’s absolutely critical that we defeat Sandy Smith and protect this
proudly Democratic seat. If Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an
immediate threat to our razor-thin Democratic majority in the House.

But we have an even bigger plan for 2022 that Sandy Smith just can’t
replicate. I know that fighting this race the right way and reaching out
to voters in every community across North Carolina, refusing fossil fuel
and corporate PAC money, and supporting policies — like universal
broadband, universal healthcare, reproductive rights, and bold climate
action — are the only way to win. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46830?t=1022&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi ]Can you help me get there by
donating $5 today? Every bit helps especially when we’re up
against our last end-of-quarter deadline before our primary election.

In solidarity,

Erica

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46830?t=1023&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220327-1031-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1031_3698_TChFZi&akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1031%2E3698%2ETChFZi

Hello,
Russia launched an unprovoked, full-scale attack against Ukraine. And there is nothing “smart, “savvy,” or “genius” about it – no matter what Donald Trump says. We must stand with the people of Ukraine.
For 4 years, my opponent Chuck Grassley applauded as Mr. Trump tore up our treaties and eroded America’s reputation abroad by alienating our allies and capitulating to Vladimir Putin. The result is what we see now.
More than ever, we need people in leadership right now who understand the costs of war. As a retired three-star admiral with over 36 years of service in the U.S. Navy, I would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley because I defended democracy around the globe. You can be sure I’ll defend it every day in the United States Senate.**
All the polling shows we are in for a nail-biter of a race, and the stakes could not be higher. If we defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority.
The only way to fight back against the millions of dollars Trump and McConnell’s Super PACs are going to spend against me is with your help now. **We need to raise $1,000,000 before our first legally-required end-of-quarter FEC deadline, but we’re still falling short. If I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now.**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450170/337258954/-42398318?refcode=em20220327pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI5ZmE0MC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rrqXVK4IdrWXd8vDWpxOdrbGhUmhWSl1S76Ne5F-Ro=)

name: Team Chelsea Clark
subject: Coffee or Democracy?
