name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Growing up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Growing up, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator.
Growing up, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator.
| | |
---
Growing up, I didn't think I would grow up to be the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and Senator.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450332/337259852/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)
My dad was a WWII veteran who survived the Battle of the Bulge. He used to look over the corner of his newspaper at the breakfast table and ask my siblings and me, “What are you doing for freedom today?”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450333/337259853/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)
That's a big question for three kids trying to finish their cereal, but it's one I make a point to answer every day. I first got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who has cerebral palsy, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450341/337259857/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)
In the Senate, I was one of the deciding votes to save the Affordable Care Act in 2017. If it weren't for 1,017 votes in New Hampshire in 2016, a Republican would have been in my seat, and millions of Americans would have lost their health care coverage.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450344/337259866/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)
It is the honor of my lifetime to represent Granite Staters, and I’m not done fighting for New Hampshire. From lowering the cost of prescription drugs to ending Big Oil’s billions in tax breaks, I'll continue working to ensure that all Americans, regardless of personal circumstances, have the opportunity to succeed.

But here's the deal: **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and I'm at the top of his list.** That's why GOP groups have spent more against me than any other Senate Democrat (over $7.5 million and counting).

I hate asking for money, but I really need your help to win this November. **[_If you can, please chip in $3 or as much as you're comfortable with before our critical FEC deadline._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450345/337259867/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)**
I really appreciate it!

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450346/337259868/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=)**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450347/337259870/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=) If you’re reading this from your phone, [**click here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450350/337259871/110765679?refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=&emci=7b0818fe-73ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5631cf4-19ae-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893) to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43450352/337259874/-2088849429?refcode=mh-jtk819-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTYzMWNmNC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDjVseUboe1uPOZySmJRrm6HRMUyiYQ-3YhDufmF_So=&emci=7b0818fe-73ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5631cf4-19ae-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893).

name: Team Mathis HQ
subject: all eyes on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
This is a longer email about our upcoming FEC deadline. We hope you’ll take a moment to read and consider making your first donation to Liz’s campaign before the end of the month.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43446508/337238524/-1969271810?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.27_b1_tmhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmE4ZWRmMi1mOWFkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ySujSPK1UVYhvWWPvWwFR-901J3v5dPwEtzRF0hHJlY=) Hi Peter,

clean_body: | = Team, We have less than one week before we file our quarterly fundraising report with the FEC. It's the last quarterly report before the primary, and the numbers we show up with could set the tone for the rest of this campaign. Most importantly, it's a critical opportunity to show that Kara has the support of the people, and that we have what it takes to flip this district from red to blue. And with Kara being the only person running who has pledged to not take corporate PAC money, it's a chance to make clear that NY-01 wants a representative who isn't beholden to corporate special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're building a case that to win tough elections, you can embrace universal child care and health care coverage and reject corporate PACs and fossil fuel money. But to ensure we can win, we need your support. Team, your contribution could be the difference between having a candidate that knows and understands grassroots, progressive values, and a candidate unwilling to take a stand. It could also mean having a candidate that works on behalf of the people on Long Island and not one who is tied to the interests of corporate donors. = = Enjoy the rest of your weekend! Kelley Hardon Campaign Manager Kara Hahn For Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. name: Team Lira
body:
Peter,

March is wrapping up — that means we’re about to hit our first big End of Quarter deadline since winning the primary.

We’ve set a high bar for ourselves — we want to raise $12,731 by midnight on Thursday. Can you jump in now and contribute whatever you can towards our goal?

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327]

We’ve set a goal for this campaign that is both ambitious and specific, because we want you to know exactly where things stand for us.
We’ve calculated our goal based on three things:

1. What we'll need to start off this next quarter stronger than ever

There are a lot of eyes on this race, Peter, and they’ll be watching to see what our numbers look like going into our first full quarter after the primary. We need to send a message by starting off strong so we can show the power of this grassroots movement.

2. Preparing for any attacks from our opponent

This part of the race is where things can get messy and we need to be prepared to respond to any attacks that Tony Gonzales and the GOP might throw our way.

3. Costs for reaching voters on the ground

Moving forward, voter contact is the most important thing we can do — but this part of campaigning isn’t cheap. We need resources to be able to make phone calls, knock doors, attend events, pass out literature, and more.

In order to achieve our goals, we need your help to finish out this quarter strong and hit our $12,731 goal. If you have the means, will you donate now to help us gear up for the coming months? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327]

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220327?refcode=em20220327]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Our first real test of 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Here's the ugly truth about campaign fundraising:
Members of Congress are often told that they should spend up to five hours each day on "call time" — time solely dedicated to calling up mega-donors and PACs to get big checks and ensure reelection. That's more than half of a regular workday.
But as the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and a leader championing Medicare for All, climate resilience, humane immigration reform, protecting and expanding our Democratic majorities in Congress, and so much more — **any minute**** _not_****spent on those priorities puts our progress at risk.**
[**So to keep Pramila focused on leading and legislating, we're hoping that you'll help us with our first real test of 2022: the mandatory FEC end-of-quarter deadline. We need to raise $35,000 by 11:59 PM on March 31st. Can you contribute $3 or any amount today to help us get there?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11457?refcode=em20220327-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1133%2E420207%2EyxDGEs)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11457?refcode=em20220327-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1133%2E420207%2EyxDGEs)**
Pramila relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time because she does NOT accept corporate PAC contributions. Not a dime. Not even a penny. And every time this campaign gets a donation from someone like you pitching in through an email like this one, we're proving that there's a better way to do politics — **_a way that puts people first._**
[**Contribute $3 or any amount today to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal and keep Pramila focused on her fearless advocacy for working families.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11457?refcode=em20220327-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1133%2E420207%2EyxDGEs)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

clean_body: Peter, Here's the ugly truth about campaign fundraising: Members of Congress are often told that they should spend up to five hours each day on "call time" — time solely dedicated to calling up mega-donors and PACs to get big checks and ensure reelection. That's more than half of a regular workday. But as the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and a leader championing Medicare for All, climate resilience, humane immigration reform, protecting and expanding our Democratic majorities in Congress, and so much more — any minute notspent on those priorities puts our progress at risk. Pramila relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time because she does NOT accept corporate PAC contributions. Not a dime. Not even a penny. And every time this campaign gets a donation from someone like you pitching in through an email like this one, we're proving that there's a better way to do politics — a way that puts people first. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Every day, members of the congressional committee investigating the attack work tirelessly to expose the truth, while GOP partisans continue to throw up roadblocks to shield Trump from being held accountable.
Now, **The** **New York Times****is reporting that Trump KNEW he lost the election** and did everything in his power – including potentially committing criminal conspiracy – to overturn it anyway.
With Trump increasingly hinting at a 2024 presidential run, it's more important now than ever that we protect the country from GOP extremists and their endless web of lies. Hundreds of concerned Democrats have shared where they stand, but we’re missing a response from YOU, friend. We need your answer now, before Trump makes his 2024 presidential run official.

---
| Dear Friend, I'm honored to have the endorsement of my good friend, fellow conservative, and member of the Goochland School Board Angela Allen in my campaign for 2023 to be Virginia State Senator District 10!
For a better future, we must fix our broken education system. One of many things Angela and I have in common is we both support Governor Glenn Youngkin's education agenda. I have always supported School Choice, empowering parents, and making our children our top priority. Divisive ideologies must be eliminated from our classrooms. We need a morally upright education system that teaches patriotism and our history the good and the bad. Children should be taught how to think not what to think.
As a current Member of the House of Delegates, I know first hand how important it is we win back the Virginia State Senate. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Hope to see you around the district! -John
---
|
---
| | |
---

Following up with you, Peter
| | | Hey Peter,

Did you see Mark’s message below? Our FEC End-of-Quarter deadline is coming up at midnight on Thursday and we’re still running $857 behind our critical fundraising goal. **Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50 (or more, if you can) to help close the gap?** [**< < TAP OR CLICK HERE TO DONATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/67517dd7b2011c35/535a9bb1a791f545c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Mark can win this race, keep this seat red, and build a firewall to protect North Carolina from Biden’s far-left agenda. But he urgently needs your support to get the job done. Our deadline is just hours away, so please pitch in now! Team Walker
---

His weakness has emboldened our enemies and led to disasters in Afghanistan and Ukraine. His lawless immigration policies have led to a massive crisis at our southern border. His out-of-control government spending has caused the worst inflation in 40 years. As a conservative, a North Carolinian, and a proud American, I cannot sit back while Biden destroys our nation. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate to keep this seat red and end one-party Democrat control in D.C. My campaign is coming up on a critical FEC End-of-Quarter deadline, and we must raise $857 before Thursday at midnight. Will you chip into this crucial effort with a special End-of-Quarter donation today?

body:
Did you see John’s message?
| | | Hey Fellow Conservative, We’ll keep this quick - we just wanted to make sure you saw John’s message below.

Today, we kicked off our most important grassroots fundraising drive yet...

**The FEC End-of-Quarter reporting deadline is coming up FAST this Thursday, and we can’t afford to fall short of our $15,000 online goal.**

**[Please make your most generous possible donation NOW.>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/3354f38c29348908c3d6b838967d376c/37373)**
John Kovacs is the America First conservative in this race who has what it takes to defeat Pelosi puppet Susie Lee and the Democrat campaign machine.

_He’s counting on your help as we ramp up to GET THE JOB DONE!_

[**We have just over 11 weeks to go until the primary. Every day and every dollar counts.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/d970be742a9417b3c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

Thanks, and we appreciate your support. -Team Kovacs
---
[**STAND WITH JOHN**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/0017eb4185583006c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative, Our campaign has been hard at work mobilizing grassroots supporters across the district, and our momentum is growing. My message is resonating everywhere we go.

Republicans in NV-03 want an AMERICA FIRST WARRIOR fighting for them in Congress, and I am running to be that warrior.

I need your help to continue this effort, and the most important fundraising deadline yet is JUST DAYS away.

[**Will you rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation toward our $15,000 End-of-Quarter goal?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/5bca13c67c5c5985c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/b0b266a99dc96d2fc3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
This is our final major fundraising deadline before the primary on June 14th.

[**It is vital that we post strong numbers and continue building up the campaign war chest we’ll need to take on Susie Lee and her special interest backers.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/9279cddb98c9462ac3d6b838967d376c/37373)

My only motivation to run for Congress is my love for our great nation. I know we can flip this seat, take back the House, and stop the insanity in Washington, but we need to have EVERY fight-to-win America First conservative on board.

[**Thank you in advance for ANY donation you can send to help us kick off this critical drive.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/7d55bed3ef16e713/4baee8d09829d5e0c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

subject: running for office while Muslim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nida for NC
body:
|
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/eceejilLXq6GKgT-pkhqGg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkIz9hP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDMyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9yYXNoaWRhXzkwZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MjZ5dlpLdmxiUDlmOEJNUnQ2ZHVvaVBZWGdZJnJlZmNvZGUyPTI2eXZaS3ZsYlA5ZjhCTVJ0NmR1b2lQWVhnWSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yNnl2Wkt2bGJQOWY4Qk1SdDZkdW9pUFlYZ1lXA3NwY0IKYj1hukBi_0V5LlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAHA~)
---
Hi, this is Rep. Rashida Tlaib.

In 2018, Ilhan Omar and I became the first ever Muslim women elected to U.S. Congress.

**I’m thrilled to endorse progresive Nida Allam for NC-4. She has an unprecedented chance to become the first Muslim woman elected to Congress from the South.** | [ ](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/eceejilLXq6GKgT-pkhqGg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkIz9hP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDMyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9yYXNoaWRhXzkwZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MjZ5dlpLdmxiUDlmOEJNUnQ2ZHVvaVBZWGdZJnJlZmNvZGUyPTI2eXZaS3ZsYlA5ZjhCTVJ0NmR1b2lQWVhnWSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yNnl2Wkt2bGJQOWY4Qk1SdDZkdW9pUFlYZ1lXA3NwY0IKYj1hukBi_0V5LlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAHA~)
---|---
_I know firsthand the obstacles that Nida will face running for Congress as a proud Muslim woman and progressive._

Nida has already faced vicious lies and attacks on her candidacy from prominent Republicans.

**We need to build an unprecedented coalition of progressives from across North Carolina to fight back against their hate and lies.** [**_Nida’s election is coming up fast, and we need to act quick to fight back against the GOP’s Islamophobic attacks. name: Tony Vargas
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I need you to read this.

|
---

| | [**_I have a real shot to flip this seat for Democrats for the first time in six years -- but Republican Congressman Don Bacon’s special interest friends just funneled him $728k to stop me. I refuse to let them crush our chance to win -- but frankly, I have a big fundraising hole to fill before my End of Quarter Deadline in 96 hours. If I can’t hit my goal, I won’t be able to run ads and pay for the staff I need to win. Can you rush my campaign $10 before my first End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline in 96 hours? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43447936/337245158/1129282168?refcode=20220327_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlMjU5NC0wNGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7T0GV_XWBOzkG3Ikwqrt6Yf7JLUTSTgxKwn4Bd3YN4=) Washington special interests are terrified of me -- let me explain why.

**[Unlike a lot of Congressmen, I’ve lived in poverty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43447937/337245159/1129282168?refcode=20220327_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlMjU5NC0wNGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7T0GV_XWBOzkG3Ikwqrt6Yf7JLUTSTgxKwn4Bd3YN4=)**

My dad, a Peruvian immigrant, sold hot dogs, drove a taxi, and worked on a factory line to make ends meet. **[And unlike Congressman Don Bacon, I believe that tax breaks should go to working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43447938/337245160/1129282168?refcode=20220327_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlMjU5NC0wNGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7T0GV_XWBOzkG3Ikwqrt6Yf7JLUTSTgxKwn4Bd3YN4=)**

That’s why Washington special interests just rushed Bacon $728k to stop me. [**_But in a race so tight, I will lose if I can’t respond. But I don’t have personal wealth to bankroll my campaign -- I’m relying on grassroots donors like you. To close the hole in my fundraising and stand up to Don Bacon’s massive warchest, I need 1,000 gifts before my first End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline of the Election Year. Can I count on your $10? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43447939/337245161/1129282168?refcode=20220327_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlMjU5NC0wNGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7T0GV_XWBOzkG3Ikwqrt6Yf7JLUTSTgxKwn4Bd3YN4=) The system is pretty messed up:

\-- First, Congressman Bacon voted to cut taxes for the ultra-wealthy \-- Then, they rushed hundreds of thousands of dollars to protect him

[**But the fact is, in a race so close, this special interest cash will cost me my chance to defeat Bacon if I can’t respond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43447940/337245162/1129282168?refcode=20220327_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v1&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTFlMjU5NC0wNGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7T0GV_XWBOzkG3Ikwqrt6Yf7JLUTSTgxKwn4Bd3YN4=)

I don’t have personal wealth to fund my campaign, and I certainly don’t have special interest friends funneling me money.

That’s why I’m so proud to say that my campaign has raised more money from Nebraskans than Bacon -- clearly, this district is ready for a change. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Hey Friends, this may be Dr. Kermit’s first campaign, but he’s been fighting for healthcare reform for many years. **As a White House Fellow under President Obama, he led on expanding veterans’ access to healthcare jobs.** As an attorney, he worked with the FDA to get life-saving medications on the market. And in 2020, Dr. Kermit served on the health care advisory committee for Pete Buttigieg’s presidential campaign. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43451553/337265003/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_202203227pete_tk_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGYwYzM4NC0yNmFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDF2gf2z5LAiOrPL917qrRlZ2OzVeh0AgYUk5MC7ddU=)

**Dr. Kermit is running to expand on the Affordable Care Act, lower prescription drugs, and protect families from medical debt and bankruptcy.**
He has already published a peer-reviewed plan on how to fix our healthcare system. But he can’t get to Congress and make it a reality without our help.
The GOP has made winning this seat a top priority in 2022 — and they’re already signaling that **if they win the majority, they’re going to repeal Obamacare** and pre-existing condition coverage.

clean_body: | = Hey Friends, this may be Dr. Kermit’s first campaign, but he’s been fighting for healthcare reform for many years. As a White House Fellow under President Obama, he led on expanding veterans’ access to healthcare jobs. As an attorney, he worked with the FDA to get life-saving medications on the market. And in 2020, Dr. Kermit served on the health care advisory committee for Pete Buttigieg’s presidential campaign. | = Dr. Kermit is running to expand on the Affordable Care Act, lower prescription drugs, and protect families from medical debt and bankruptcy. He has already published a peer-reviewed plan on how to fix our healthcare system. But he can’t get to Congress and make it a reality without our help. The GOP has made winning this seat a top priority in 2022 — and they’re already signaling that if they win the majority, they’re going to repeal Obamacare and pre-existing condition coverage. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Sincerely, Team Kermit | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. ---
| | Dear Peter, Our coalition has grown again! In the last few weeks we’ve been endorsed by two former Democratic governors and the Teamsters, and now **Tobias has just been endorsed by the essential workers of UNITE HERE Local 8.** **[They know that Oregon needs change, but we need to keep up the momentum to get there. Will you join our coalition with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43448294/337248461/1542981758?refcode=em032722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVhN2E3ZC0wOGFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=57zWNFk6op6lxVKSEPVuN6POg15EWLqIUcAAAARTNek=)** UNITE HERE members are the folks who work hard to keep our hospitality industry moving and our economy growing. name: Val Demings (Candidate for U.S. Senate)
subject: an update on my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters
| | |
---
I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – in nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my midnight fundraising deadline and _still_ falling 12% short of my $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. **It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. **
I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, _so_ much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and, most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's daily fundraising goal by midnight.
Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43451862/337269634/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFlNDViMy0yYWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kdr9KBQbPP13wBnsEAMivTeBxiia73jDykyqKIJaT6o=)**
With so much gratitude,

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43451863/337269641/1417698435?refcode=jtk2755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFlNDViMy0yYWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kdr9KBQbPP13wBnsEAMivTeBxiia73jDykyqKIJaT6o=&emci=2520ffdc-fcaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=eb1e45b3-2aae-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. **

clean_body: Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters | | | I wanted to share an update on my race, friend, and I hope you'll read this through to the end. The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – in nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points. Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my midnight fundraising deadline and still falling 12% short of my $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so, so much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and, most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's daily fundraising goal by midnight. Every single dollar will make a difference in this must-win race, so I'm asking: Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Here's the best link: = With so much gratitude, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. body:
We know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so we’ll keep this message short and sweet. Thanks in advance for taking the time to read it. **First, some good news:** We recently made our first TV ad buy — seven figures in every major market across Wisconsin. This was a big investment for our campaign, but it was the risk we needed to take if we want to get Sarah’s message in front of as many voters as possible and defeat Ron Johnson. **Now, the bad news:** The latest ActBlue fundraising update shows us tracking behind our Q1 projections by about 14%. That may not seem like much, but it's enough to make a significant difference on our first public FEC report of the year, which Republicans will use to verify if we have the resources to compete with them on TV. Look, we understand these emails can get annoying at times, and the last thing we want is to get on your nerves. But it’s important that you know when we ask for the occasional grassroots donation, we don’t expect everyone to chip in. We only ask because when it does fit your budget, you will. That’s why we’re humbly asking you today: **[Will you make your first donation to Sarah Godlewski's campaign for U.S. Senate before the March 31 FEC deadline? clean_body: We know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so we’ll keep this message short and sweet. Thanks in advance for taking the time to read it. First, some good news: We recently made our first TV ad buy — seven figures in every major market across Wisconsin. This was a big investment for our campaign, but it was the risk we needed to take if we want to get Sarah’s message in front of as many voters as possible and defeat Ron Johnson. Now, the bad news: The latest ActBlue fundraising update shows us tracking behind our Q1 projections by about 14%. That may not seem like much, but it's enough to make a significant difference on our first public FEC report of the year, which Republicans will use to verify if we have the resources to compete with them on TV. Look, we understand these emails can get annoying at times, and the last thing we want is to get on your nerves. But it’s important that you know when we ask for the occasional grassroots donation, we don’t expect everyone to chip in. We only ask because when it does fit your budget, you will. That’s why we’re humbly asking you today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, so we’re really hoping you can step up with your first donation. Thanks for everything. — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

name: John Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Change my mind.
#
_I dedicate this email to every U.S. Senator who makes $174,000 a year and refused to vote to raise our national minimum wage of $7.25 an hour so workers might live with some dignity._
Derek,
You don’t need an MBA to understand this: A minimum wage of $7.25 is great for giant corporations, but _devastating_ for the millions of Americans trapped in poverty while working for less than $15 an hour.
I will truly never understand how Republicans in the Senate, let alone some Democrats, can be OK with single mothers working for starvation wages. **Living in dignity isn’t political, and it’s long past time we raise the national minimum wage to *at least* $15 an hour.**
And make no mistake. Every penny a multimillion dollar business pays below a minimum living wage is a penny YOU AS TAXPAYERS cough up for things like food, shelter, health care, child care.
In other words...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45972?refcode=em20220327-5149&t=1&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)
If you agree with me that our nation’s minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is shitty, Derek, then know this: **Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I promise I would be that 51st vote to raise it.**
**[But I need your help to get there. Can you please make your first donation of $5 or another amount to our campaign? We must close our fundraising deficit before our big fundraising deadline on March 31.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45972?refcode=em20220327-5149&t=2&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45972?amount=5&refcode=em20220327-5149&t=21&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)**
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. When it comes to our nation's economy, I think it's pretty clear: We don't have a labor shortage, we have a shitty wage surplus. If you're with me and ready for more Democrats who actually vote like Democrats in the U.S. Senate, then **[please consider chipping in $5 or more right now to help reach our first quarter goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45972?amount=5&refcode=em20220327-5149&t=22&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220327-5149-footer&t=23&refcode2=5149_434096_dXi5TI&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5149%2E434096%2EdXi5TI)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| Team, it’s hard to believe it’s already here, but by the end of this week, we face our first FEC deadline of 2022 on March 31. We have to turn in our books and **everyone will see publicly whether we have the resources to _FLIP_ Arizona completely _BLUE._**

Right now, we’re behind. Really behind. Just look at some of these recent headlines!

body:
What if you woke up to a checking account balance of $23 million? We know what our opponent would do... |
---
Peter,

What would you do if you woke up and saw that your checking account balance was $23 million?

**Well, our Democrat opponent has $23 million in his campaign account RIGHT NOW, so he's already spending millions on TV and digital ads 8 months ahead of November's election.**

Despite what our opponent writes in his emails, he isn't short on time or resources. And yet, he's one point behind our campaign in recent polls.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8407c785c22d4308adeebcdaa01432a0&_e=NogBKMyBlIlXdoWfOfdQLq9lQBHGwIB-V3fUm5H1peObvIvXWvmGf5gDi3eo9_EW5BNKGwgg8DKT7qeQ1PHhenk7OTlRUWMKDEXE2M0tulUmmXPXzRC_BnGx0F4T7aYkXUGPgneG8vYN0qTbb1avyqvX5PYob1n8sd5sgBJ2ANp2EeKruKYq4JhmbimWCTFuiP8dQ4KbH7DJo7v5MGcu88pX9I79h9Ks7ukse4t8mpENQ_ezCiOMQR1epTEJ66FeoUVtT7c7urdDAuclGa1h9LQvsynQ4bkmXHCszjEv5m8tFbpJdHnHkhdHx0FuAQpMkNISWc6uMfL4n7aU-1Bes554lwPYBS2y1RlauAVmG0lEM52uk67ao-_QwwOR2233RzJ9-y3jl5ZgaJoeakNZJqmQ0NwkY7wNgn9rrJgKEYInGgcRMw5cY99YK4VcxdCcvRA2Bb5WqkfNpA8Zm5bQlg%3D%3D)
**$23,000,000** is a tremendous amount of money to have in the bank at the end of 2021, but **he's going to need every penny** to explain to Georgians why he has voted 95% of the time for the Biden agenda of more government spending, more dependence on foreign energy, more mandates, and more inflation.

While our campaign may be one point ahead in this critical battleground race right now, polls can change overnight. **I learned in sports that you always play aggressively like you're behind, so our campaign is already operating day-in and day-out like we're several points behind with just two weeks left until Election Day.**

We want to increase our momentum and expand our polling lead, but we need YOUR help. Peter, we've got a very big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on March 31st that we need to CRUSH!

**We're hoping that this email can raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to help keep us on course to hitting our goal.[Do you think you can chip in just a few dollars right now to set us up for success by the end of the night?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8407c785c22d4308adeebcdaa01432a0&_e=NogBKMyBlIlXdoWfOfdQLq9lQBHGwIB-V3fUm5H1peObvIvXWvmGf5gDi3eo9_EW5BNKGwgg8DKT7qeQ1PHhenk7OTlRUWMKDEXE2M0tulUmmXPXzRC_BnGx0F4T7aYkXUGPgneG8vYN0qTbb1avyqvX5PYob1n8sd5sgBJ2ANp2EeKruKYq4JhmbimWCTFuiP8dQ4KbH7DJo7v5MGcu88pX9I79h9Ks7ukse4t8mpENQ_ezCiOMQR1epTEJ66Fefcxj5unBGjHlp0P0kwyxuxlWerU4px93Jn0yZUbgSk4Qqt_I-oS8z7IJ5guhBsIi7qrQ7rxOnpGdJfGbh2XtzSM3aU-0Pvpv94IyhUsilt7e2wHYvCB6U7Ar742UcxvmY-x36D2kwEcnl_ubTckKRRCeDgxguEw9D-V1Ft4du5vhK3X3wS9hviWVAbHj9XwPnVnuRhWq5a9acuFj_wp7Ew%3D%3D)**

clean_body: What if you woke up to a checking account balance of $23 million? We know what our opponent would do... | Peter, What would you do if you woke up and saw that your checking account balance was $23 million? Well, our Democrat opponent has $23 million in his campaign account RIGHT NOW, so he's already spending millions on TV and digital ads 8 months ahead of November's election. Despite what our opponent writes in his emails, he isn't short on time or resources. And yet, he's one point behind our campaign in recent polls. $23,000,000 is a tremendous amount of money to have in the bank at the end of 2021, but he's going to need every penny to explain to Georgians why he has voted 95% of the time for the Biden agenda of more government spending, more dependence on foreign energy, more mandates, and more inflation. While our campaign may be one point ahead in this critical battleground race right now, polls can change overnight. I learned in sports that you always play aggressively like you're behind, so our campaign is already operating day-in and day-out like we're several points behind with just two weeks left until Election Day. We want to increase our momentum and expand our polling lead, but we need YOUR help. Peter, we've got a very big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on March 31st that we need to CRUSH! We're hoping that this email can raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to help keep us on course to hitting our goal. Thank you so much for your consideration. We hope to hear from you in the next few hours, Peter. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I could really use your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle.
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mh-split?refcode=em220327-2-t1&refcode2=610.357359.RT9fyk&t=1&akid=610%2E357359%2ERT9fyk)
Hi there -
In a moment I'm going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Cheri Beasley’s Senate campaign but first, let me explain why your support is so critical:
* More money has been spent attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat this cycle
* If I lose here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate
* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection
* We can't win without your support

It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, my team and I will need as much help as we can get. [**That's why I'm reaching out to ask: Will you split $5 between Cheri Beasley and me to win our races and keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mh-split?refcode=em220327-2-t1&refcode2=610.357359.RT9fyk&t=2&akid=610%2E357359%2ERT9fyk)
**[CHIP IN](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mh-split?refcode=em220327-2-t1&refcode2=610.357359.RT9fyk&t=3&akid=610%2E357359%2ERT9fyk)**
Republicans have spent over $7.5 million attacking me, but our resources to fight back are limited. This will be one of the most closely watched races of the year and if our support wavers, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor.
I know we can win this race, but it will take an army of grassroots support from people like you. [**So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to my campaign and Cheri Beasley’s to protect our Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mh-split?refcode=em220327-2-t1&refcode2=610.357359.RT9fyk&t=4&akid=610%2E357359%2ERT9fyk)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: BREAKING: Warnock’s February numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our Democrat opponent raised $2.71 million online in February. We’re going to need the support of every conservative today if we want to win back the |
---
_**BREAKING NEWS**_

**Over $96,000 a day.
$2.7 million in just 28 days. **
Fellow American, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised online in February according to a new report filed by ActBlue.

clean_body: Let’s Take Back the House | AMERICA AND IOWA NEED YOU, Friend! | We are getting VERY close to the End of the First Quarter, and we STILL have a lot of work to do if we want to stop Pelosi’s relentless attacks. This first EOQ deadline can make or break this campaign! We need to finish out strong! We need to stop Nancy Pelosi and Crooked Joe Biden from tearing this country apart! Nancy Pelosi tried to steal our rightfully won election in 2020, and she is, without a DOUBT going to do it again. We need your help to make it so she won’t even have a chance. It is time for ALL Republican supporters to step up and STOP PELOSI! ARE YOU WITH US? Thank you for your support, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail,

Our first major FEC deadline since Odessa launched her campaign in TN-07 is just days away, Peter. I wanted to take a moment and lay out why this deadline — [**_and our digital goal to raise $10,000 before the end of the month_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi0JRAPrpIwely2GXFGJwTFlOX_jkO5uqocpdUl8bvxIlUcYgqEzIThPJlzXtUSLeMqFQ4qUdqO-zKgYRtDv4BjEEjfsNs3JQ7G690W_vn1VA3iNW7nLTm1ZnX0Lqq1BPEYU_MBNf73c-NJiOhZbDLQIeESLMhV2W_YGXjYfyu-Y5nPVPypKqtsSJ4B5qVYSGPnVaUQge8ISMI7f_Nu6L-WZJMu7VMRbUN1bPUHdNzIfc7S3CFh5gRMAB4ntSDxqJXZ7FT5Udae4xvwlHX5Mz_aptnWM3jUGGVzOatAgFbOIcPh36cXtRNHly2qdmB4-gRNmx86S6pGuBH1f1QdKhf-A/3kp/g0vAMzV1SA2iN4NhDH1A0g/h1/lZdrGDDNOZWe6eOL3rvaPEcTARaXtwFOHOFxDBofH6U) — is our most important yet.
1. This is our first major FEC fundraising deadline since Odessa launched her campaign in Tennessee’s 7th district. After March 31, our fundraising numbers will be posted publicly for everyone to see, including journalists, organizers, and Mark Green himself. They’re waiting to see how strong a campaign we’re putting together — and now more than ever, we need to prove that we have what it takes to win.
2. Mark Green and the ultra-conservative right will do everything in their power to keep us from flipping this seat. They’ve already tried to silence our voices and votes through gerrymandering, and we know Mark Green won’t hesitate to throw his millions into the race to try and outspend us.
3. Flipping this seat could be our shot at keeping a Democratic majority in the House. We know Tennessee is ready for a leader who will really deliver for working people, and the latest data tells us that this seat is going to be competitive. To win, we’ve got to be ready for a fight.

**There’s a lot at stake** — and hitting our $10,000 digital fundraising goal before the March 31 deadline ensures we’ll be ready for whatever is coming next. [**_That’s why I’m asking you for a donation — of any amount — to help us hit our goal before midnight on Thursday._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi0JRAPrpIwely2GXFGJwTFlOX_jkO5uqocpdUl8bvxImYtUEWYse5e0YEZaQHZ2JJVdTSamO6VK8WS3b9cW-8b5rEf8JIFhyNM4sU2TK6nD6SnndPXR7NJ51XtocFmA6i4RmEAzrxWrHIxZQyck3Ubp_Guu9JesZ51Lh---sYD7_uZnpUTUvvIDwzjDYMzCKoYYk7dppMCZB6KD4a1FZ_k2eBbh-7bCMFDLrwRkbHUr4nIy-zHgZ0YM2h95m5JsMXcKq28siuoOslXSPHeFpM8ef1JVJnZI75ZnphpZcerAEYlCjieXWqYp93FwZQBOJS9e9SxNxUO7_5g77EGH89GA/3kp/g0vAMzV1SA2iN4NhDH1A0g/h2/85lKuQ1KK8iaSJIA98W8hDqC-2HE-_Og0rcX5JO_Rsw) name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update March 27, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d4f74200c55b/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8866753?e=698f056321)
---
For those of you new to this update, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I’m running for Congress in Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in the Republican primary set for June 7th. I’ve been a State Senator from Pascagoula for 10 years and have a track record of working hard and getting things done. You can learn more about me, my record and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7052aee895&e=698f056321). Below are some highlights from this week in my role as State Senator along with updates from our Congressional Campaign. I hope you continue to keep up with us as I continue fulfilling my duties as State Senator. This is a top priority for me during this campaign, because I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man’s character, give him power.”_ _-Abraham Lincoln_
|
---
## Passed The Largest Teacher Pay Raise In Mississippi History
| | | | | | This was a monumental moment in Mississippi history! This past Tuesday, the MS Legislature passed the largest teacher pay raise in state history. Starting teacher pay will be increased from $37,123 to $41,638, which puts our state above the southeastern and national averages. This was a hard-fought battle by both the House and the Senate, but here we are! As a Senate Education Committee member, its passage has been a goal of mine to help us compete in attracting new teachers, retain our current teachers and recognize the valuable work our teachers do. I have always stood behind our state's educators and promise to continue to do so as your Congressman. After all, our teachers are responsible for shaping the future of America. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ac7ff3c3b7&e=698f056321) to read the Mississippi Today article for more details.|
---
|
---
## Ocean Springs: Met With Members of the Lighthouse Academy
| | | | | |
---
| Meeting with constituents face to face matters. On Tuesday, I met with members of the Lighthouse Academy from Ocean Springs on the steps of the Capitol. This group is dedicated to the enrichment of academics for dyslexic children. I appreciate their interest, and together I know we can get things done.|
---
## We Need to Make Public Service Attractive To Young People Again
| | | | | |
---
| I know how meaningful it can be to serve as a role model for young people. Having been a soccer coach for 20+ years, a high school mock trial coach for 8+ years, a baseball coach, Sunday school teacher, and author of the Early Learning Collaborative Act, I’ve seen the results of investing in our children and youth.. Those of us in Public Service need to continue to set the bar high in our acts, words and deeds.Developing the leaders of tomorrow is more than a seminar, it's a life calling, and continuing that calling is important to me. You can watch our policy video on this topic [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=096187e25c&e=698f056321).|
---
## Arts Day at the Capitol
| | | | | | I always look forward to Arts Day at the Capitol organized by the Mississippi Arts Commission. The day includes exhibits from arts-focused organizations in the rotunda to encourage support for the arts and to promote why the arts matter to our communities. Last year it was a virtual event, and it was great to see it back in person. Pictured here, I got to visit with Julian Rankin, Executive Director of the Walter Anderson Museum of Art (WAMA) in Ocean Springs.|
---
|
---
## No Proxy Voting for Me
| | | | | |
---
| No proxy voting for me. My job is to be engaged in the process for you. I spent this weekend working in Jackson in my Senate capacity. This particular weekend each year is what is called Conference Weekend, where members of the Legislature work in small groups as “conference committees” (3 members of the House and 3 members of the Senate) to work out compromises on bills. Through this weekend an agreement was reached about the Tax Cut bill. We’ll be sharing more about that over the next few days.|

* Conference reports
* Finalize tax cut
* State legislative redistricting
* Equal Pay legislation for women

clean_body: | | | For those of you new to this update, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I’m running for Congress in Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in the Republican primary set for June 7th. I’ve been a State Senator from Pascagoula for 10 years and have a track record of working hard and getting things done. You can learn more about me, my record and my campaign . Below are some highlights from this week in my role as State Senator along with updates from our Congressional Campaign. I hope you continue to keep up with us as I continue fulfilling my duties as State Senator. This is a top priority for me during this campaign, because I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution. | | “Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man’s character, give him power.” -Abraham Lincoln | Passed The Largest Teacher Pay Raise In Mississippi History | | | | | | This was a monumental moment in Mississippi history! This past Tuesday, the MS Legislature passed the largest teacher pay raise in state history. Starting teacher pay will be increased from $37,123 to $41,638, which puts our state above the southeastern and national averages. This was a hard-fought battle by both the House and the Senate, but here we are! As a Senate Education Committee member, its passage has been a goal of mine to help us compete in attracting new teachers, retain our current teachers and recognize the valuable work our teachers do. I have always stood behind our state's educators and promise to continue to do so as your Congressman. After all, our teachers are responsible for shaping the future of America. Click to read the Mississippi Today article for more details.| | Ocean Springs: Met With Members of the Lighthouse Academy | | | | | | | Meeting with constituents face to face matters. On Tuesday, I met with members of the Lighthouse Academy from Ocean Springs on the steps of the Capitol. This group is dedicated to the enrichment of academics for dyslexic children. I appreciate their interest, and together I know we can get things done.| We Need to Make Public Service Attractive To Young People Again | | | | | | | I know how meaningful it can be to serve as a role model for young people. Having been a soccer coach for 20+ years, a high school mock trial coach for 8+ years, a baseball coach, Sunday school teacher, and author of the Early Learning Collaborative Act, I’ve seen the results of investing in our children and youth.. Those of us in Public Service need to continue to set the bar high in our acts, words and deeds.Developing the leaders of tomorrow is more than a seminar, it's a life calling, and continuing that calling is important to me. You can watch our policy video on this topic .| Arts Day at the Capitol | | | | | | I always look forward to Arts Day at the Capitol organized by the Mississippi Arts Commission. The day includes exhibits from arts-focused organizations in the rotunda to encourage support for the arts and to promote why the arts matter to our communities. Last year it was a virtual event, and it was great to see it back in person. Pictured here, I got to visit with Julian Rankin, Executive Director of the Walter Anderson Museum of Art (WAMA) in Ocean Springs.| | No Proxy Voting for Me | | | | | | | No proxy voting for me. My job is to be engaged in the process for you. I spent this weekend working in Jackson in my Senate capacity. This particular weekend each year is what is called Conference Weekend, where members of the Legislature work in small groups as “conference committees” (3 members of the House and 3 members of the Senate) to work out compromises on bills. Through this weekend an agreement was reached about the Tax Cut bill. We’ll be sharing more about that over the next few days.| | | | | | | | | The Week Ahead Conference reports Finalize tax cut State legislative redistricting Equal Pay legislation for women | Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. We're just a few days away from our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year! We set an ambitious online fundraising goal to reach before the 31st at midnight, and I wanted to share why it's crucial we don't come up short.

This FEC deadline marks the first time our fundraising numbers will be made public this year. When our numbers are reported, we know national Republicans and Kim's three conservative Republican opponents will be looking at what we raise to judge the strength of our grassroots team.

We need to show them we have what it takes to protect Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority, and we're counting on help from this grassroots team.

name: Elaine Luria
subject: Here's how we're going to hold my seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449976/337258472/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmI5ZmE0MC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7exKSz5TNI6KhM8sQV-3lLU-Qlr00Ik0UJuSbeNkFk=)

| | Folks – I talk to you a lot about how competitive and expensive the race for VA-02 is, **but today I want to talk to you about how we’re going to win.** Before I get into that, I have to ask – [**will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign? I’m coming up on my critical FEC deadline in just FOUR days, and right now I’m falling behind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449978/337258476/1975305454?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220327_FR_EOQ2HowWeWin_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmI5ZmE0MC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7exKSz5TNI6KhM8sQV-3lLU-Qlr00Ik0UJuSbeNkFk=) | | | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449979/337258477/1975305454?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220327_FR_EOQ2HowWeWin_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmI5ZmE0MC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7exKSz5TNI6KhM8sQV-3lLU-Qlr00Ik0UJuSbeNkFk=)
---
* * *
**Meet voters where they’re at**
We’re going to win by meeting voters where they’re at – my team and I will be traveling to every corner of VA-02 to meet and talk to voters about the issues that matter to them most, like climate action and affordable healthcare.
Coastal Virginians are at the core of this campaign, and everything I fight for in Congress is a reflection of that. My opponent is worried about winning Trump’s approval and toeing the Republican Party line, but my top priority will always be you.
**Build a powerful grassroots team**
We’re going to win by building a powerful grassroots team – that’s where you come in. I need all hands on deck to take on the national Republicans who will be flooding this race with millions of dollars in outside spending to support my opponent.
Every time you chip in, knock doors, make phone calls, fill out a petition, or talk about my campaign to a friend or neighbor, you are strengthening this team’s grassroots power and our ability to stand up to the GOP who desperately want to flip my seat.
**Hit every fundraising goal until November**
We’re going to win by hitting every fundraising goal until the election – but right now, we aren’t on track to hit our end-of-quarter goal.
This month is different, folks – it marks the first FEC fundraising deadline of the election year, which means that we’ll have to publicly report our numbers. Everyone will be looking at our fundraising progress to assess if we have the resources to keep VA-02 blue.
[**Folks – will you chip in $25 or more to my end-of-quarter fundraising goal today? I’m falling behind, and if we don’t hit this goal, we won’t be able to travel to meet voters, hire staff to train our incredible volunteers, or stand up to the GOP’s mega-donors.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43449982/337258478/1975305454?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220327_FR_EOQ2HowWeWin_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmI5ZmE0MC0xOWFlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A7exKSz5TNI6KhM8sQV-3lLU-Qlr00Ik0UJuSbeNkFk=)

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**Friends – I have an urgent update, and I wanted you to hear it from me first:**
**1.** NBC News reports that Georgia is one of the most important swing states in the November elections, which means Senate control could be decided by our race.
**2.** Donald Trump just held a megadonor fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago with my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), so they can flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me.
**3\. Our people-powered movement is falling short of the resources we need to fight back. If we don't see an _immediate_ surge of grassroots support, we could be outraised and outspent right before our first official FEC deadline of the election year.
Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to climate justice – is on the line in Georgia. **With the latest polls showing me 1 POINT BEHIND Walker, we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal – so I'm counting on you to help us close our budget gap now:**
[Please, will you split $5 before midnight between Mark Kelly and my campaign so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-mar22?refcode=em220327-2-15&t=1&refcode2=2445_6688874__NWVI1&akid=2445%2E6688874%2E_NWVI1)
I appreciate you – thank you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2445%2E6688874%2E_NWVI1).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Fellow Conservative,

The end of the first quarter is approaching fast and I have not yet hit my fundraising goal.

My Radical opponent Abigail Spanberger is projecting massive sums of money from her dark money socialist allies. name: Cory Booker
subject: My friend, Dan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I need your help. My friend and colleague Dan Kildee is running the race of his life in Michigan.

While Dan works to lower costs for working families and bring jobs to mid-Michigan, national Republicans are targeting him with false attacks in this toss up race to try and take control of the House.

**I’ve worked with Dan on legislation to support small businesses and our Main Street economy. The fact is he’s a real leader for working Michiganders.**

Dan is an important partner for me in the House. If we want to keep him fighting for us, I need you to step up right now.

**_[That’s why I’m reaching out. Dan has a critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline coming up at the end of the month, and right now, he’s still $11,000 short of meeting his goal. Can Dan and I count on you to chip in to help us hold this critical seat? Friends,

We are only 4 days away from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, so I wanted to take a minute to explain what that means.

First, all of our fundraising numbers since the beginning of the year will be public information. All of our friends and neighbors -- and Derrick Van Orden and his extreme conservative allies -- will be able to see just how much we raised.

Second, we are that much closer to the fall elections. November may seem far away, but the election will be here before you know it.

And every dollar that we raise in March will only help reach more voters, counter more of Derrick Van Orden’s lies, and host more events between now and the fall.

I’m working my hardest to make sure we defeat this Capitol Insurrectionist. But without help from you at this critical moment, all of our plans might fall apart.

We’re a proud grassroots campaign, powered by individual donors who chip in $5, $25, or whatever they can.

And while we haven’t reached our end-of-quarter goals yet, if 50 grassroots donors chip in after reading this email, we’ll be back on track.

clean_body: Here's what we have on file for you: Team — Earlier this month, we sat down with Karen to talk through our fundraising goals. We calculated if we raise $50,000 by the end-of-month deadline on March 31st, our campaign will be in a strong position heading into early voting. This is an ambitious goal, so we're checking in with Karen's strongest supporters to see if you can help. Here's what we have on file for you: Supporter Record for dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor status: Non-donor Suggested donation: $5 According to our records, you have not yet given to Karen's historic campaign for Los Angeles mayor. If you've recently donated, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but we've received your donation and will update our records accordingly. Here's the thing: if we miss this goal, we'll have to start thinking of places we can cut our budget. So we can't risk falling behind, especially when our billionaire opponent is already on pace to spend over $20 million before the primary. Karen has the experience and the vision to create a pathway to progress for every single Angeleno. We can't let our opponent buy this race when the future of our city is on the line. But Karen will need support from people like you to keep up with our opponent's spending. — Karen Bass Finance Team Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. I wanted to check in before the week starts up about why Thursday’s Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline is so important.

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: Let’s flip the narrative here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

For a lot of Floridians, I can imagine that March has felt like a very long month. Day after day, we saw more bad news about the GOP’s antics at the state level. And day after day, Republicans in Congress did their best to outdo them.

But, we still have 5 days left in the month of March — and I think that’s just long enough to flip the narrative and end the month on a high note.

Our FIRST end-of-quarter deadline of 2022 is coming up on March 31st, and these numbers will set the tone for the next 7 months leading up to the midterm elections. Can you rush a $5 donation to help us finish the quarter strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=327eoq1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=327eoq1]

The GOP has been outraising us for MONTHS. But this first quarter of fundraising could change all of that. It could reset the narrative, prove the pundits wrong, and boost our momentum heading into November.

We can protect our majority this year. We can win this race and deliver a critical victory for our community and our country. But we need your help to do it and we need it now. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $5 before time runs out. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=327eoq1]

Thank you for being on my team.

— Randolph Bracy

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022822whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022822whem]
Good evening Peter,
Before we get into what Wade has been up to over the past couple weeks, could you help us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal? Click here to pitch in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0327]
We’ve been traveling all over the First District, but there was no better place to spend St. Patrick’s Day than right here in Savannah! There were plenty of events, but the parade through town was the highlight of the day. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade-pattyedit_2.gif]
Wade had the opportunity to speak to & meet the members of The International Longshoremen’s Association Local 1414. Organized labor is the backbone of this country, and Wade can’t wait to fight for them in Congress. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/ila-1edit.gif]
In Hinesville, we had the opportunity to meet with community leaders and attend the local food truck festival! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/hinesville-1edit.gif]
Wade has continued to meet & greet voters throughout Savannah – at Baldwin Park, Ambuc Park, Connors Temple Baptist Church, Tatemville Neighborhood Association & the Savannah West Rotary Club with Mayor Van Johnson! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/meet-03.27-sav-.gif]
We are only two months away from the primary election – let us know if you want to volunteer & help us keep the momentum going by emailing us at info@wadeherringforcongress.com!
Thank you for your continued support,
Wade Herring HQ
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0327]
